---
title: "Dev-DGE-Stickle-Rmark"
author: "Anthony Snead"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Gene-Level

## Import Data

We import the date into a count matrix and sample information matrix. We filter the count matrix and convert to DGEList.
```{r, Import Data}
# read in count matrix
Gene.Matrix <- read.csv(file = paste(getwd(), "/gene_count_matrix.csv", sep = "/"), 
                        header = TRUE, row.names = 1) %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column(., var = "Gene") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Gene = gsub('gene-\\s*|\\|.*$', "", Gene)) %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames(., var = "Gene") 
  

Gene.Filtered <- Gene.Matrix %>%
  # Filter out rows that add to 0.
  dplyr::filter(rowSums(.) != 0) %>% 
  # Filter out rows that had less than about 10 counts in less than 3 samples
  dplyr::filter(rowSums(edgeR::cpm(.) >= 1) >= 3) %>%
  # Order the columns by the column name
  dplyr::select(order(colnames(.)))

Sample.Info <- read.table(paste(getwd(), "Sample_Information.txt", sep = "/"),sep = "\t",
                          header = TRUE, row.names = 1) %>%
  dplyr::select(Clutch, Sex, Treatment, Timepoint) %>%
  dplyr::mutate_all(as.character) %>%
  tidyr::unite(col = "Group", Sex:Timepoint, sep = ".", remove = FALSE) %>%
  dplyr::mutate_all(factor) 

Sample.Info <- Sample.Info[colnames(Gene.Filtered), ]

# Create a DGEList with normalized data
DGE.Data <- edgeR::DGEList(counts = Gene.Filtered, group = as.factor(colnames(Gene.Filtered))) %>%
  # Calculate the normalization factors per sample
  edgeR::calcNormFactors(.)
```

## Testing Genes

We first transform the count data into an assay blind to the experimental design before checking if any samples or genes have too many missing values with WGCNA. The allOK field is TRUE so we retain all samples and genes.

```{r, WGCNA Testing Genes}
# Setup DESeq data from count matrix.
Transformed.Gene.Matrix <- DESeq2::DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = Gene.Filtered, colData = Sample.Info, design = ~ Group) %>%
  # Run Transformation blind to the experimental design.
  DESeq2::varianceStabilizingTransformation(., blind = TRUE) %>%
  # Extract the transformed data as a matrix.
  SummarizedExperiment::assay(.)

# Here we check for genes or samples with too many missing values. All samples and genes have passed.
Gene.GSG <- WGCNA::goodSamplesGenes(t(Transformed.Gene.Matrix), verbose = 3)
```

## Cluster

We cluster with hierarchical clustering to evaluate if there are any potential outlier samples or unexpected separation.
```{r, cluster tree}
# Here we evaluate the relationship between samples
Gene.Sample.Tree <- hclust(dist(t(Transformed.Gene.Matrix)), method = "average")
par(cex = 0.6);
par(mar = c(0,4,2,0))

# Here we plot the relationship tree.
plot(Gene.Sample.Tree, main = "Sample clustering", sub="", xlab="", cex.lab = 1.5, cex.axis = 1.5, cex.main = 2)

```

## Distribution

We log transform the count data and plot the density to evaluate the potential distribution of the data.
```{r, Gene distribtuion}

# get log counts  
log.counts <- edgeR::cpm(DGE.Data, log = TRUE, prior.count = 2)

# plot density
Histogram <- ggplot2::ggplot(data = data.frame(rowMeans(log.counts)),
                             ggplot2::aes(x = rowMeans.log.counts.)) +
  ggplot2::geom_histogram(fill = "grey") +
  ggplot2::theme_classic() +
  ggplot2::labs(y = "Density", x = "Filtered Read Counts (logCPM)",
                title = "Distribution of Normalized Filtered Read Counts")
```

## MDS Plots

Here we have MDS plots for dimension 1-4 with the top 10K, 1K, and 500 genes to explore the potential clustering in our data.

### MDS 10,000

```{r, MDS 10000}
# create mds plot in ggplot
Gene.MDS.10000.1.2 <- as.data.frame(limma::plotMDS(DGE.Data, top = 10000, gene.selection = "pairwise", 
                                                   dim.plot = c(1,2))) %>%
  # convert the object to a data frame with sample column
  tibble::rownames_to_column(., var = "Sample") %>%
  # join to treatment information for plotting
  dplyr::left_join(., tibble::rownames_to_column(Sample.Info, var = "Sample")) %>%
  # plot
  ggplot2::ggplot(., ggplot2::aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  # add ellipse
  ggforce::geom_mark_ellipse(aes(fill = Timepoint, label = Timepoint)) +
  # add points
  geom_point(ggplot2::aes(color = Sex, shape = Treatment)) +
  # add labels
  labs( title = "MDS Dimensions 1 & 2: Top 10,000 Genes",
        x = "MDS Axis 1",
        y = "MDS Axis 2") +
  # change theme
  ggplot2::theme_classic()

# create mds plot in ggplot
Gene.MDS.10000.2.3 <- as.data.frame(limma::plotMDS(DGE.Data, top = 10000, gene.selection = "pairwise",
                                                   dim.plot = c(2,3))) %>%
  # convert the object to a data frame with sample column
  tibble::rownames_to_column(., var = "Sample") %>%
  # join to treatment information for plotting
  dplyr::left_join(., tibble::rownames_to_column(Sample.Info, var = "Sample")) %>%
  # plot
  ggplot2::ggplot(., ggplot2::aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  # add ellipse
  ggforce::geom_mark_ellipse(aes(fill = Timepoint, label = Timepoint)) +
  # add points
  geom_point(ggplot2::aes(color = Sex, shape = Treatment)) +
  # add labels
  labs( title = "MDS Dimensions 2 & 3: Top 10,000 Genes",
        x = "MDS Axis 2",
        y = "MDS Axis 3") +
  # change theme
  ggplot2::theme_classic()

# create mds plot in ggplot
Gene.MDS.10000.3.4 <- as.data.frame(limma::plotMDS(DGE.Data, top = 10000, gene.selection = "pairwise",
                                                   dim.plot = c(3,4))) %>%
  # convert the object to a data frame with sample column
  tibble::rownames_to_column(., var = "Sample") %>%
  # join to treatment information for plotting
  dplyr::left_join(., tibble::rownames_to_column(Sample.Info, var = "Sample")) %>%
  # plot
  ggplot2::ggplot(., ggplot2::aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  # add ellipse
  ggforce::geom_mark_ellipse(aes(fill = Timepoint, label = Timepoint)) +
  # add points
  geom_point(ggplot2::aes(color = Sex, shape = Treatment)) +
  # add labels
  labs( title = "MDS Dimensions 3 & 4: Top 10,000 Genes",
        x = "MDS Axis 3",
        y = "MDS Axis 4") +
  # change theme
  ggplot2::theme_classic()
```

### MDS 1,000

```{r, MDS 1000}
# create mds plot in ggplot
Gene.MDS.1000.1.2 <- as.data.frame(limma::plotMDS(DGE.Data, top = 1000, 
                                                  gene.selection = "pairwise", dim.plot = c(1,2))) %>%
  # convert the object to a data frame with sample column
  tibble::rownames_to_column(., var = "Sample") %>%
  # join to treatment information for plotting
  dplyr::left_join(., tibble::rownames_to_column(Sample.Info, var = "Sample")) %>%
  # plot
  ggplot2::ggplot(., ggplot2::aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  # add ellipse
  ggforce::geom_mark_ellipse(aes(fill = Timepoint, label = Timepoint)) +
  # add points
  geom_point(ggplot2::aes(color = Sex, shape = Treatment)) +
  # add labels
  labs( title = "MDS Dimensions 1 & 2: Top 1,000 Genes",
        x = "MDS Axis 1",
        y = "MDS Axis 2") +
  # change theme
  ggplot2::theme_classic()

# create mds plot in ggplot
Gene.MDS.1000.2.3 <- as.data.frame(limma::plotMDS(DGE.Data, top = 1000, 
                                                  gene.selection = "pairwise", dim.plot = c(2,3))) %>%
  # convert the object to a data frame with sample column
  tibble::rownames_to_column(., var = "Sample") %>%
  # join to treatment information for plotting
  dplyr::left_join(., tibble::rownames_to_column(Sample.Info, var = "Sample")) %>%
  # plot
  ggplot2::ggplot(., ggplot2::aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  # add ellipse
  ggforce::geom_mark_ellipse(aes(fill = Timepoint, label = Timepoint)) +
  # add points
  geom_point(ggplot2::aes(color = Sex, shape = Treatment)) +
  # add labels
  labs( title = "MDS Dimensions 2 & 3: Top 1,000 Genes",
        x = "MDS Axis 2",
        y = "MDS Axis 3") +
  # change theme
  ggplot2::theme_classic()

# create mds plot in ggplot
Gene.MDS.1000.3.4 <- as.data.frame(limma::plotMDS(DGE.Data, top = 1000, gene.selection = "pairwise", 
                                                  dim.plot = c(3,4))) %>%
  # convert the object to a data frame with sample column
  tibble::rownames_to_column(., var = "Sample") %>%
  # join to treatment information for plotting
  dplyr::left_join(., tibble::rownames_to_column(Sample.Info, var = "Sample")) %>%
  # plot
  ggplot2::ggplot(., ggplot2::aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  # add ellipse
  ggforce::geom_mark_ellipse(aes(fill = Timepoint, label = Timepoint)) +
  # add points
  geom_point(ggplot2::aes(color = Sex, shape = Treatment)) +
  # add labels
  labs( title = "MDS Dimensions 3 & 4: Top 1,000 Genes",
        x = "MDS Axis 3",
        y = "MDS Axis 4") +
  # change theme
  ggplot2::theme_classic()
```

### MDS 500

```{r, MDS 500}
# create mds plot in ggplot
Gene.MDS.500.1.2 <- as.data.frame(limma::plotMDS(DGE.Data, top = 500, gene.selection = "pairwise", 
                                                 dim.plot = c(1,2))) %>%
  # convert the object to a data frame with sample column
  tibble::rownames_to_column(., var = "Sample") %>%
  # join to treatment information for plotting
  dplyr::left_join(., tibble::rownames_to_column(Sample.Info, var = "Sample")) %>%
  # plot
  ggplot2::ggplot(., ggplot2::aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  # add ellipse
  ggforce::geom_mark_ellipse(aes(fill = Timepoint, label = Timepoint)) +
  # add points
  geom_point(ggplot2::aes(color = Sex, shape = Treatment)) +
  # add labels
  labs( title = "MDS Dimensions 1 & 2: Top 500 Genes",
        x = "MDS Axis 1",
        y = "MDS Axis 2") +
  # change theme
  ggplot2::theme_classic()

# create mds plot in ggplot
Gene.MDS.500.2.3 <- as.data.frame(limma::plotMDS(DGE.Data, top = 500, gene.selection = "pairwise", 
                                                 dim.plot = c(2,3))) %>%
  # convert the object to a data frame with sample column
  tibble::rownames_to_column(., var = "Sample") %>%
  # join to treatment information for plotting
  dplyr::left_join(., tibble::rownames_to_column(Sample.Info, var = "Sample")) %>%
  # plot
  ggplot2::ggplot(., ggplot2::aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  # add ellipse
  ggforce::geom_mark_ellipse(aes(fill = Timepoint, label = Timepoint)) +
  # add points
  geom_point(ggplot2::aes(color = Sex, shape = Treatment)) +
  # add labels
  labs( title = "MDS Dimensions 2 & 3: Top 500 Genes",
        x = "MDS Axis 2",
        y = "MDS Axis 3") +
  # change theme
  ggplot2::theme_classic()

# create mds plot in ggplot
Gene.MDS.500.3.4 <- as.data.frame(limma::plotMDS(DGE.Data, top = 500, gene.selection = "pairwise",
                                                 dim.plot = c(3,4))) %>%
  # convert the object to a data frame with sample column
  tibble::rownames_to_column(., var = "Sample") %>%
  # join to treatment information for plotting
  dplyr::left_join(., tibble::rownames_to_column(Sample.Info, var = "Sample")) %>%
  # plot
  ggplot2::ggplot(., ggplot2::aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  # add ellipse
  ggforce::geom_mark_ellipse(aes(fill = Timepoint, label = Timepoint)) +
  # add points
  geom_point(ggplot2::aes(color = Sex, shape = Treatment)) +
  # add labels
  labs( title = "MDS Dimensions 3 & 4: Top 500 Genes",
        x = "MDS Axis 3",
        y = "MDS Axis 4") +
  # change theme
  ggplot2::theme_classic()
```

## Differential Gene Expression

```{r, Dream metadata}
# make dream meta data
Dream.Meta <- Sample.Info %>%
  # male characters
  dplyr::mutate_all(as.character)
```

```{r, Dream parameters}
# this is used implicitly by dream() to run in parallel
Params <- BiocParallel::SnowParam(32, "SOCK", progressbar = TRUE, exportglobals = FALSE)

# formula for dream
Dream.Form <- ~0 + Group + (1|Clutch)
```

```{r,Dream contrasts}
# make contrasts
Dream.Constrast <- variancePartition::makeContrastsDream(Dream.Form, Dream.Meta, contrasts = c(
  # difference between males by treatment at 48
  "GroupM.Predator.48 - GroupM.Control.48",
  # difference between females by treatment at 48
  "GroupF.Predator.48 - GroupF.Control.48",
  # difference between males by treatment at 98
  "GroupM.Predator.98 - GroupM.Control.98",
  # difference between females by treatment at 98
  "GroupF.Predator.98 - GroupF.Control.98",
  # difference between males by treatment at 144
  "GroupM.Predator.144 - GroupM.Control.144",
  # difference between females by treatment at 144
  "GroupF.Predator.144 - GroupF.Control.144",
  # difference between males by treatment at 240
  "GroupM.Predator.240 - GroupM.Control.240",
  # difference between females by treatment at 240
  "GroupF.Predator.240 - GroupF.Control.240",
  # main sex effect at time 48
  "(GroupM.Predator.48 + GroupM.Control.48 - GroupF.Predator.48 - GroupF.Control.48)/2",
  # main sex effect at time 98
  "(GroupM.Predator.98 + GroupM.Control.98 - GroupF.Predator.98 - GroupF.Control.98)/2",
  # main sex effect at time 140
  "(GroupM.Predator.144 + GroupM.Control.144 - GroupF.Predator.144 - GroupF.Control.144)/2",
  # main sex effect at time 240
  "(GroupM.Predator.240 + GroupM.Control.240 - GroupF.Predator.240 - GroupF.Control.240)/2",
  # main predator effect at time 48
  "(GroupM.Predator.48 - GroupM.Control.48 + GroupF.Predator.48 - GroupF.Control.48)/2",
  # main predator effect at time 98
  "(GroupM.Predator.98 - GroupM.Control.98 + GroupF.Predator.98 - GroupF.Control.98)/2",
  # main predator effect at time 144
  "(GroupM.Predator.144 - GroupM.Control.144 + GroupF.Predator.144 - GroupF.Control.144)/2",
  # main predator effect at time 240
  "(GroupM.Predator.240 - GroupM.Control.240 + GroupF.Predator.240 - GroupF.Control.240)/2",
  # interaction effect at time 48
  "(GroupM.Predator.48 - GroupM.Control.48) - (GroupF.Predator.48 - GroupF.Control.48)",
  # main predator effect at time 98
  "(GroupM.Predator.98 - GroupM.Control.98) - (GroupF.Predator.98 - GroupF.Control.98)",
  # main predator effect at time 144
  "(GroupM.Predator.144 - GroupM.Control.144) - (GroupF.Predator.144 - GroupF.Control.144)",
  # main predator effect at time 240
  "(GroupM.Predator.240 - GroupM.Control.240) - (GroupF.Predator.240 - GroupF.Control.240)",
  # overall treatment affect in males
  "(GroupM.Predator.48 + GroupM.Predator.98 + GroupM.Predator.144 + GroupM.Predator.240 - GroupM.Control.48 - GroupM.Control.98 - GroupM.Control.144 - GroupM.Control.240)/4",
  # overall treatment effect in females
  "(GroupF.Predator.48 + GroupF.Predator.98 + GroupF.Predator.144 + GroupF.Predator.240 - GroupF.Control.48 - GroupF.Control.98 - GroupF.Control.144 - GroupF.Control.240)/4",
  # overall sex effect in predator treatment
  "(GroupM.Predator.48 + GroupM.Predator.98 + GroupM.Predator.144 + GroupM.Predator.240 - GroupF.Predator.48 - GroupF.Predator.98 - GroupF.Predator.144 - GroupF.Predator.240)/4",
  # overall sex effect in control
  "(GroupM.Control.48 + GroupM.Control.98 + GroupM.Control.144 + GroupM.Control.240 - GroupF.Control.48 - GroupF.Control.98 - GroupF.Control.144 - GroupF.Control.240)/4",
  # overall sex effect across all timepoints
  "(GroupM.Control.48 + GroupM.Control.98 + GroupM.Control.144 + GroupM.Control.240 + GroupM.Predator.48 + GroupM.Predator.98 + GroupM.Predator.144 + GroupM.Predator.240 - GroupF.Control.48 - GroupF.Control.98 - GroupF.Control.144 - GroupF.Control.240 - GroupF.Predator.48 - GroupF.Predator.98 - GroupF.Predator.144 - GroupF.Predator.240)/8",
  # overall treatment effect across all timepoints
  "(GroupM.Predator.48 + GroupM.Predator.98 + GroupM.Predator.144 + GroupM.Predator.240 + GroupF.Predator.48 + GroupF.Predator.98 + GroupF.Predator.144 + GroupF.Predator.240 - GroupM.Control.48 - GroupM.Control.98 - GroupM.Control.144 - GroupM.Control.240 - GroupF.Control.48 - GroupF.Control.98 - GroupF.Control.144 - GroupF.Control.240)/8",
  # overall interaction effect
  "((GroupM.Predator.48  - GroupM.Control.48) - (GroupF.Predator.48 - GroupF.Control.48) + (GroupM.Predator.98 - GroupM.Control.98) - (GroupF.Predator.98 - GroupF.Control.98) + (GroupM.Predator.144 - GroupM.Control.144) - (GroupF.Predator.144 - GroupF.Control.144) + (GroupM.Predator.240 - GroupM.Control.240) - (GroupF.Predator.240 - GroupF.Control.240))/4"))


```

```{r, Grene Voom Dream}
# estimate weights using linear mixed model of dream
Gene.vobjDream <- variancePartition::voomWithDreamWeights(DGE.Data,
                                                          Dream.Form, Dream.Meta, BPPARAM = Params)
```

```{r, Gene Dream fit}
# Dream fit
Gene.Dream.Fit <- variancePartition::dream(Gene.vobjDream, Dream.Form, Dream.Meta,
                                           Dream.Constrast, BPPARAM = Params,
                                           ddf = "Kenward-Roger")

# ebayes
Gene.Dream.Fit <- variancePartition::eBayes(Gene.Dream.Fit)
```


```{r, Gene Dream Results}
# dream results
DGE.Dream.Results <- lapply(X = list(
  # difference between males by treatment at 48
  "GroupM.Predator.48 - GroupM.Control.48",
  # difference between females by treatment at 48
  "GroupF.Predator.48 - GroupF.Control.48",
  # difference between males by treatment at 98
  "GroupM.Predator.98 - GroupM.Control.98",
  # difference between females by treatment at 98
  "GroupF.Predator.98 - GroupF.Control.98",
  # difference between males by treatment at 144
  "GroupM.Predator.144 - GroupM.Control.144",
  # difference between females by treatment at 144
  "GroupF.Predator.144 - GroupF.Control.144",
  # difference between males by treatment at 240
  "GroupM.Predator.240 - GroupM.Control.240",
  # difference between females by treatment at 240
  "GroupF.Predator.240 - GroupF.Control.240",
  # main sex effect at time 48
  "(GroupM.Predator.48 + GroupM.Control.48 - GroupF.Predator.48 - GroupF.Control.48)/2",
  # main sex effect at time 98
  "(GroupM.Predator.98 + GroupM.Control.98 - GroupF.Predator.98 - GroupF.Control.98)/2",
  # main sex effect at time 140
  "(GroupM.Predator.144 + GroupM.Control.144 - GroupF.Predator.144 - GroupF.Control.144)/2",
  # main sex effect at time 240
  "(GroupM.Predator.240 + GroupM.Control.240 - GroupF.Predator.240 - GroupF.Control.240)/2",
  # main predator effect at time 48
  "(GroupM.Predator.48 - GroupM.Control.48 + GroupF.Predator.48 - GroupF.Control.48)/2",
  # main predator effect at time 98
  "(GroupM.Predator.98 - GroupM.Control.98 + GroupF.Predator.98 - GroupF.Control.98)/2",
  # main predator effect at time 144
  "(GroupM.Predator.144 - GroupM.Control.144 + GroupF.Predator.144 - GroupF.Control.144)/2",
  # main predator effect at time 240
  "(GroupM.Predator.240 - GroupM.Control.240 + GroupF.Predator.240 - GroupF.Control.240)/2",
  # interaction effect at time 48
  "(GroupM.Predator.48 - GroupM.Control.48) - (GroupF.Predator.48 - GroupF.Control.48)",
  # main predator effect at time 98
  "(GroupM.Predator.98 - GroupM.Control.98) - (GroupF.Predator.98 - GroupF.Control.98)",
  # main predator effect at time 144
  "(GroupM.Predator.144 - GroupM.Control.144) - (GroupF.Predator.144 - GroupF.Control.144)",
  # main predator effect at time 240
  "(GroupM.Predator.240 - GroupM.Control.240) - (GroupF.Predator.240 - GroupF.Control.240)",
  # overall treatment affect in males
  "(GroupM.Predator.48 + GroupM.Predator.98 + GroupM.Predator.144 + GroupM.Predator.240 - GroupM.Control.48 - GroupM.Control.98 - GroupM.Control.144 - GroupM.Control.240)/4",
  # overall treatment effect in females
  "(GroupF.Predator.48 + GroupF.Predator.98 + GroupF.Predator.144 + GroupF.Predator.240 - GroupF.Control.48 - GroupF.Control.98 - GroupF.Control.144 - GroupF.Control.240)/4",
  # overall sex effect in predator treatment
  "(GroupM.Predator.48 + GroupM.Predator.98 + GroupM.Predator.144 + GroupM.Predator.240 - GroupF.Predator.48 - GroupF.Predator.98 - GroupF.Predator.144 - GroupF.Predator.240)/4",
  # overall sex effect in control
  "(GroupM.Control.48 + GroupM.Control.98 + GroupM.Control.144 + GroupM.Control.240 - GroupF.Control.48 - GroupF.Control.98 - GroupF.Control.144 - GroupF.Control.240)/4",
  # overall sex effect across all timepoints
  "(GroupM.Control.48 + GroupM.Control.98 + GroupM.Control.144 + GroupM.Control.240 + GroupM.Predator.48 + GroupM.Predator.98 + GroupM.Predator.144 + GroupM.Predator.240 - GroupF.Control.48 - GroupF.Control.98 - GroupF.Control.144 - GroupF.Control.240 - GroupF.Predator.48 - GroupF.Predator.98 - GroupF.Predator.144 - GroupF.Predator.240)/8",
  # overall treatment effect across all timepoints
  "(GroupM.Predator.48 + GroupM.Predator.98 + GroupM.Predator.144 + GroupM.Predator.240 + GroupF.Predator.48 + GroupF.Predator.98 + GroupF.Predator.144 + GroupF.Predator.240 - GroupM.Control.48 - GroupM.Control.98 - GroupM.Control.144 - GroupM.Control.240 - GroupF.Control.48 - GroupF.Control.98 - GroupF.Control.144 - GroupF.Control.240)/8",
  # overall interaction effect
  "((GroupM.Predator.48 - GroupM.Control.48) - (GroupF.Predator.48 - GroupF.Control.48) + (GroupM.Predator.98 - GroupM.Control.98) - (GroupF.Predator.98 - GroupF.Control.98) + (GroupM.Predator.144 - GroupM.Control.144) - (GroupF.Predator.144 - GroupF.Control.144) + (GroupM.Predator.240 - GroupM.Control.240) - (GroupF.Predator.240 - GroupF.Control.240))/4"),
  FUN = function(X){
    variancePartition::topTable(Gene.Dream.Fit, 
                                coef = X, 
                                adjust.method = "BH",
                                p.value = 0.05, 
                                number = Inf) %>%
      # get gene ID
      tibble::rownames_to_column(., var = "Gene_Id") %>%
      dplyr::mutate(Contrast = X)}) %>%
  # bind the list of results together
  dplyr::bind_rows(.)
```

################### DID NOT RUN THIS ###################

```{r, genome information}
Genome_Info <- read.table(paste0(getwd(), "/Genome_Table.tsv"), header = TRUE, sep = "\t")


```

```{r, DGE Table with Info}
# make table with all the extra information
DGE.Dream.Results.Info.Table <- DGE.Dream.Results %>%
  
  
  dplyr::left_join(., biomaRt::getBM(filters = "ensembl_gene_id", attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "external_gene_name", "zfin_id_symbol", "description","chromosome_name", "go_id", "definition_1006"),
                                     values =  .$Gene_Id, mart= Gene_Names), by = c("Gene_Id" = "ensembl_gene_id"), multiple  = "all")

Test <- DGE.Dream.Results.Info.Table %>% filter(Contrast == "(GroupM.Predator.240 - GroupM.Control.240 + GroupF.Predator.240 - GroupF.Control.240)/4")
```

## WGCNA

### WGCNA Set up

```{r, WGCNA Set up}
# no factors
options(stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# enable multi-threading
WGCNA::enableWGCNAThreads(nThreads = 80)
```

### Global

```{r, WGCNA Data Formating}
# Setup DESeq data from count matrix.
WGCNA.Data.Matrix <- DESeq2::DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = Gene.Filtered, colData = Sample.Info, design = ~ 1) %>%
  # normalize
  DESeq2::vst(.) %>%
  # extract normalized ata
  SummarizedExperiment::assay(.) %>%
  # transpose
  t(.)
```

#### Network Contruction

##### Soft Threshold

```{r, Global Pick Soft Threshold}
# create vector of powers
powers <- c(seq(2, 20, by = 1))

# test powers
Soft.Thresh.Df <- WGCNA::pickSoftThreshold(WGCNA.Data.Matrix, powerVector = powers, verbose = 5)

# graph thresholds
ggplot((data.frame(Soft.Thresh.Df$fitIndices) %>%
          dplyr::mutate(model_fit = -sign(slope) * SFT.R.sq)), aes(x = Power, y = model_fit, label = Power)) +
  # plot points
  geom_point() +
  # labels
  geom_text(nudge_y = 0.1) +
  #  WGCNA recommended as an R^2 cutoff
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.90, col = "red") +
  # labels
  xlab("Soft Threshold (power)") +
  ylab("Scale Free Topology Model Fit, signed R^2") +
  ggtitle("Scale independence") +
  # format 
  theme_classic()

```

##### Build Network

```{r, Global Build Network}
# run WGCNA
WGCNA.bw.net <- WGCNA::blockwiseModules(WGCNA.Data.Matrix,
                                        maxBlockSize = 100000,
                                        TOMType = "signed",
                                        power = 5,
                                        numericLabels = TRUE,
                                        randomSeed = 42)

# write to results
readr::write_rds(WGCNA.bw.net,
                 file = paste(getwd(), "/Results/WGCNA/WGCNA_results.RDS", sep = ""))
```


#### Differential Module Expression

```{r, Global WGCNA eigen}
# data frame of eigengene module data
Modules.Eig <- t(WGCNA.bw.net$MEs)-min(WGCNA.bw.net$MEs)

# Module zero is where all genes that are not in a module go so we should remove it
Modules.Eig <- Modules.Eig[!(row.names(Modules.Eig)) == "ME0",]
```

```{r, Global module genes}
# genes within the modules
Module.Genes <- tibble::enframe(WGCNA.bw.net$colors,
                                       name = "Gene_Id", value = "Module")

```


```{r, Global modules eigen}
Modules.Eig <- edgeR::DGEList(counts = Modules.Eig,
                                  group = as.factor(colnames(Gene.Filtered)))
```

```{r, Global WGCNA Voom Dream}
# estimate weights using linear mixed model of dream
WGCNA.vobjDream <- variancePartition::voomWithDreamWeights(
  Modules.Eig,
  Dream.Form, Dream.Meta, BPPARAM = Params)
```

```{r,Global WGCNA Dream fit}
# Dream fit
WGCNA.Fit <- variancePartition::dream(WGCNA.vobjDream, Dream.Form, Dream.Meta,
                                               Dream.Constrast, BPPARAM = Params,
                                               ddf = "Kenward-Roger")

# ebayes
WGCNA.Fit <- variancePartition::eBayes(WGCNA.Fit)
```

```{r, WGCNA}
WGCNA.DEM.Results <- lapply(X = list(
  # difference between males by treatment at 48
  "GroupM.Predator.48 - GroupM.Control.48",
  # difference between females by treatment at 48
  "GroupF.Predator.48 - GroupF.Control.48",
  # difference between males by treatment at 98
  "GroupM.Predator.98 - GroupM.Control.98",
  # difference between females by treatment at 98
  "GroupF.Predator.98 - GroupF.Control.98",
  # difference between males by treatment at 144
  "GroupM.Predator.144 - GroupM.Control.144",
  # difference between females by treatment at 144
  "GroupF.Predator.144 - GroupF.Control.144",
  # difference between males by treatment at 240
  "GroupM.Predator.240 - GroupM.Control.240",
  # difference between females by treatment at 240
  "GroupF.Predator.240 - GroupF.Control.240",
  # main sex effect at time 48
  "(GroupM.Predator.48 + GroupM.Control.48 - GroupF.Predator.48 - GroupF.Control.48)/2",
  # main sex effect at time 98
  "(GroupM.Predator.98 + GroupM.Control.98 - GroupF.Predator.98 - GroupF.Control.98)/2",
  # main sex effect at time 140
  "(GroupM.Predator.144 + GroupM.Control.144 - GroupF.Predator.144 - GroupF.Control.144)/2",
  # main sex effect at time 240
  "(GroupM.Predator.240 + GroupM.Control.240 - GroupF.Predator.240 - GroupF.Control.240)/2",
  # main predator effect at time 48
  "(GroupM.Predator.48 - GroupM.Control.48 + GroupF.Predator.48 - GroupF.Control.48)/2",
  # main predator effect at time 98
  "(GroupM.Predator.98 - GroupM.Control.98 + GroupF.Predator.98 - GroupF.Control.98)/2",
  # main predator effect at time 144
  "(GroupM.Predator.144 - GroupM.Control.144 + GroupF.Predator.144 - GroupF.Control.144)/2",
  # main predator effect at time 240
  "(GroupM.Predator.240 - GroupM.Control.240 + GroupF.Predator.240 - GroupF.Control.240)/2",
  # interaction effect at time 48
  "(GroupM.Predator.48 - GroupM.Control.48) - (GroupF.Predator.48 - GroupF.Control.48)",
  # main predator effect at time 98
  "(GroupM.Predator.98 - GroupM.Control.98) - (GroupF.Predator.98 - GroupF.Control.98)",
  # main predator effect at time 144
  "(GroupM.Predator.144 - GroupM.Control.144) - (GroupF.Predator.144 - GroupF.Control.144)",
  # main predator effect at time 240
  "(GroupM.Predator.240 - GroupM.Control.240) - (GroupF.Predator.240 - GroupF.Control.240)",
  # overall treatment affect in males
  "(GroupM.Predator.48 + GroupM.Predator.98 + GroupM.Predator.144 + GroupM.Predator.240 - GroupM.Control.48 - GroupM.Control.98 - GroupM.Control.144 - GroupM.Control.240)/4",
  # overall treatment effect in females
  "(GroupF.Predator.48 + GroupF.Predator.98 + GroupF.Predator.144 + GroupF.Predator.240 - GroupF.Control.48 - GroupF.Control.98 - GroupF.Control.144 - GroupF.Control.240)/4",
  # overall sex effect in predator treatment
  "(GroupM.Predator.48 + GroupM.Predator.98 + GroupM.Predator.144 + GroupM.Predator.240 - GroupF.Predator.48 - GroupF.Predator.98 - GroupF.Predator.144 - GroupF.Predator.240)/4",
  # overall sex effect in control
  "(GroupM.Control.48 + GroupM.Control.98 + GroupM.Control.144 + GroupM.Control.240 - GroupF.Control.48 - GroupF.Control.98 - GroupF.Control.144 - GroupF.Control.240)/4",
  # overall sex effect across all timepoints
  "(GroupM.Control.48 + GroupM.Control.98 + GroupM.Control.144 + GroupM.Control.240 + GroupM.Predator.48 + GroupM.Predator.98 + GroupM.Predator.144 + GroupM.Predator.240 - GroupF.Control.48 - GroupF.Control.98 - GroupF.Control.144 - GroupF.Control.240 - GroupF.Predator.48 - GroupF.Predator.98 - GroupF.Predator.144 - GroupF.Predator.240)/8",
  # overall treatment effect across all timepoints
  "(GroupM.Predator.48 + GroupM.Predator.98 + GroupM.Predator.144 + GroupM.Predator.240 + GroupF.Predator.48 + GroupF.Predator.98 + GroupF.Predator.144 + GroupF.Predator.240 - GroupM.Control.48 - GroupM.Control.98 - GroupM.Control.144 - GroupM.Control.240 - GroupF.Control.48 - GroupF.Control.98 - GroupF.Control.144 - GroupF.Control.240)/8",
  # overall interaction effect
  "((GroupM.Predator.48 - GroupM.Control.48) - (GroupF.Predator.48 - GroupF.Control.48) + (GroupM.Predator.98 - GroupM.Control.98) - (GroupF.Predator.98 - GroupF.Control.98) + (GroupM.Predator.144 - GroupM.Control.144) - (GroupF.Predator.144 - GroupF.Control.144) + (GroupM.Predator.240 - GroupM.Control.240) - (GroupF.Predator.240 - GroupF.Control.240))/4"),
  FUN = function(X){
    variancePartition::topTable(WGCNA.Fit, 
                                                         coef = X, 
                                                         adjust.method = "BH",
                                                         p.value = 0.05, 
                                                         number = Inf) %>%
      # get gene ID
      tibble::rownames_to_column(., var = "Module") %>%
      dplyr::mutate(Contrast = X)}) %>%
  # bind the list of results together
  dplyr::bind_rows(.)

```


#### DID NOT DO THIS CHUNK YET
```{r, DME Table with Gene Info}
# make table with all the extra information
DME.Global.Results.Info.Table <- Module.Genes %>%
  dplyr::left_join(., biomaRt::getBM(filters = "ensembl_gene_id", attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "external_gene_name", "zfin_id_symbol", "description", "go_id", "definition_1006"),
                                     values =  .$Gene_Id, mart= Gene_Names), by = c("Gene_Id" = "ensembl_gene_id"), multiple  = "all")
```

### Time 48

```{r, 48 WGCNA Data Formating}
# Setup DESeq data from count matrix.
WGCNA.Data.Matrix.48 <- DESeq2::DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = (Gene.Filtered %>%
                                                                      dplyr::select(contains("48"))),
                                                       colData = (Sample.Info %>%
                                                                    dplyr::filter(Timepoint == 48)),
                                                       design = ~ 1) %>%
  # normalize
  DESeq2::vst(.) %>%
  # extract normalized ata
  SummarizedExperiment::assay(.) %>%
  # transpose
  t(.)
```

#### Network Contruction

##### Soft Threshold

```{r, 48 Pick Soft Threshold}
# create vector of powers
powers <- c(seq(2, 20, by = 1))

# test powers
Soft.Thresh.Df.48 <- WGCNA::pickSoftThreshold(WGCNA.Data.Matrix.48, powerVector = powers, verbose = 5)

# graph thresholds
ggplot((data.frame(Soft.Thresh.Df.48$fitIndices) %>%
          dplyr::mutate(model_fit = -sign(slope) * SFT.R.sq)), aes(x = Power, y = model_fit, label = Power)) +
  # plot points
  geom_point() +
  # labels
  geom_text(nudge_y = 0.1) +
  #  WGCNA recommended as an R^2 cutoff
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.90, col = "red") +
  # labels
  xlab("Soft Threshold (power)") +
  ylab("Scale Free Topology Model Fit, signed R^2") +
  ggtitle("Scale independence") +
  # format 
  theme_classic()

```

##### Build Network

```{r,48 Build Network}
# run WGCNA
WGCNA.bw.net.48 <- WGCNA::blockwiseModules(WGCNA.Data.Matrix.48,
                                        maxBlockSize = 100000,
                                        TOMType = "signed",
                                        power = 3,
                                        numericLabels = TRUE,
                                        randomSeed = 42)

# write to results
readr::write_rds(WGCNA.bw.net.48,
                 file = paste(getwd(), "/Results/WGCNA/WGCNA_results_48.RDS", sep = ""))
```

#### Differential Module Expression


```{r,48 metadata}
# make dream meta data
Dream.Meta.48 <- Sample.Info %>%
  dplyr::filter(Timepoint == 48) %>%
  # male characters
  dplyr::mutate_all(as.character)
```

```{r,48 contrast}
# make contrasts
Dream.Constrast.48 <- variancePartition::makeContrastsDream(Dream.Form, Dream.Meta.48,
                                                                 contrasts = c(
                                                                   # difference between males by treatment at 48
  "GroupM.Predator.48 - GroupM.Control.48",
  # difference between females by treatment at 48
  "GroupF.Predator.48 - GroupF.Control.48",
  # difference between male and female in control at 48
  "GroupM.Control.48 - GroupF.Control.48",
  # difference between male and female in predator at 48
  "GroupM.Predator.48 - GroupF.Predator.48",
  # main sex effect at time 48
  "(GroupM.Predator.48 + GroupM.Control.48 - GroupF.Predator.48 - GroupF.Control.48)/2",
  # main predator effect at time 48
  "(GroupM.Predator.48 - GroupM.Control.48 + GroupF.Predator.48 - GroupF.Control.48)/2",
  # interaction effect at time 48
  "(GroupM.Predator.48 - GroupM.Control.48) - (GroupF.Predator.48 - GroupF.Control.48)"))


```

```{r,48 WGCNA eigen}
# data frame of eigengene module data
Modules.Eig.48 <- t(WGCNA.bw.net.48$MEs)-min(WGCNA.bw.net.48$MEs)

# Module zero is where all genes that are not in a module go so we should remove it
Modules.Eig.48 <- Modules.Eig.48[!(row.names(Modules.Eig.48)) == "ME0",]
```

```{r,48 module genes}
# genes within the modules
Module.Genes.48 <- tibble::enframe(WGCNA.bw.net.48$colors,
                                       name = "Gene_Id", value = "Module")

```


```{r,48 modules eigen}
Modules.Eig.48 <- edgeR::DGEList(counts = Modules.Eig.48,
                                  group = as.factor(colnames((Gene.Filtered %>%
                                                                dplyr::select(contains("48"))))))
```

```{r,48 voom dream}
# estimate weights using linear mixed model of dream
WGCNA.vobjDream.48 <- variancePartition::voomWithDreamWeights(
  Modules.Eig.48,
  Dream.Form, Dream.Meta.48, BPPARAM = Params)
```

```{r, dream fit}
# Dream fit
WGCNA.Fit.48 <- variancePartition::dream(WGCNA.vobjDream.48, Dream.Form, Dream.Meta.48,
                                               Dream.Constrast.48, BPPARAM = Params,
                                               ddf = "Kenward-Roger")

# ebayes
WGCNA.Fit.48 <- variancePartition::eBayes(WGCNA.Fit.48)
```

```{r, WGCNA}
WGCNA.DEM.Results.48 <- lapply(X = list(
  # difference between males by treatment at 48
  "GroupM.Predator.48 - GroupM.Control.48",
  # difference between females by treatment at 48
  "GroupF.Predator.48 - GroupF.Control.48",
  # difference between male and female in control at 48
  "GroupM.Control.48 - GroupF.Control.48",
  # difference between male and female in predator at 48
  "GroupM.Predator.48 - GroupF.Predator.48",
  # main sex effect at time 48
  "(GroupM.Predator.48 + GroupM.Control.48 - GroupF.Predator.48 - GroupF.Control.48)/2",
  # main predator effect at time 48
  "(GroupM.Predator.48 - GroupM.Control.48 + GroupF.Predator.48 - GroupF.Control.48)/2",
  # interaction effect at time 48
  "(GroupM.Predator.48 - GroupM.Control.48) - (GroupF.Predator.48 - GroupF.Control.48)"),
  FUN = function(X){
    variancePartition::topTable(WGCNA.Fit.48, 
                                                         coef = X, 
                                                         adjust.method = "BH",
                                                         p.value = 0.05, 
                                                         number = Inf) %>%
      # get gene ID
      tibble::rownames_to_column(., var = "Module") %>%
      dplyr::mutate(Contrast = X)}) %>%
  # bind the list of results together
  dplyr::bind_rows(.)

```

############### Did not do this############
```{r, DME Table with Gene Info}
# make table with all the extra information
DME.48.Results.Info.Table <- Module.Genes.48 %>%
  dplyr::left_join(., biomaRt::getBM(filters = "ensembl_gene_id", attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "external_gene_name", "zfin_id_symbol", "description", "go_id", "definition_1006"),
                                     values =  .$Gene_Id, mart= Gene_Names), by = c("Gene_Id" = "ensembl_gene_id"), multiple  = "all")
```

### Time 98

```{r,98 WGCNA Data Formating}
# Setup DESeq data from count matrix.
WGCNA.Data.Matrix.98 <- DESeq2::DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = (Gene.Filtered %>%
                                                                      dplyr::select(contains("98"))),
                                                       colData = (Sample.Info %>%
                                                                    dplyr::filter(Timepoint == 98)),
                                                       design = ~ 1) %>%
  # normalize
  DESeq2::vst(.) %>%
  # extract normalized ata
  SummarizedExperiment::assay(.) %>%
  # transpose
  t(.)
```

#### Network Contruction

##### Soft Threshold

```{r,98 Pick Soft Threshold}
# create vector of powers
powers <- c(seq(2, 20, by = 1))

# test powers
Soft.Thresh.Df.98 <- WGCNA::pickSoftThreshold(WGCNA.Data.Matrix.98, powerVector = powers, verbose = 5)

# graph thresholds
ggplot((data.frame(Soft.Thresh.Df.98$fitIndices) %>%
          dplyr::mutate(model_fit = -sign(slope) * SFT.R.sq)), aes(x = Power, y = model_fit, label = Power)) +
  # plot points
  geom_point() +
  # labels
  geom_text(nudge_y = 0.1) +
  #  WGCNA recommended as an R^2 cutoff
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.90, col = "red") +
  # labels
  xlab("Soft Threshold (power)") +
  ylab("Scale Free Topology Model Fit, signed R^2") +
  ggtitle("Scale independence") +
  # format 
  theme_classic()

```

##### Build Network

```{r,98 Build Network}
# run WGCNA
WGCNA.bw.net.98 <- WGCNA::blockwiseModules(WGCNA.Data.Matrix.98,
                                        maxBlockSize = 100000,
                                        TOMType = "signed",
                                        power = 11,
                                        numericLabels = TRUE,
                                        randomSeed = 42)

# write to results
readr::write_rds(WGCNA.bw.net.98,
                 file = paste(getwd(), "/Results/WGCNA/WGCNA_results_98.RDS", sep = ""))
```


#### Differential Module Expression

```{r,98 metadata}
# make dream meta data
Dream.Meta.98 <- Sample.Info %>%
  dplyr::filter(Timepoint == 98) %>%
  # male characters
  dplyr::mutate_all(as.character)
```

```{r,98 contrast}
# make contrasts
Dream.Constrast.98 <- variancePartition::makeContrastsDream(Dream.Form, Dream.Meta.98,
                                                                 contrasts = c(
                                                                   # difference between males by treatment at 98
  "GroupM.Predator.98 - GroupM.Control.98",
  # difference between females by treatment at 98
  "GroupF.Predator.98 - GroupF.Control.98",
  # difference between male and female in control at 98
  "GroupM.Control.98 - GroupF.Control.98",
  # difference between male and female in predator at 98
  "GroupM.Predator.98 - GroupF.Predator.98",
  # main sex effect at time 98
  "(GroupM.Predator.98 + GroupM.Control.98 - GroupF.Predator.98 - GroupF.Control.98)/2",
  # main predator effect at time 98
  "(GroupM.Predator.98 - GroupM.Control.98 + GroupF.Predator.98 - GroupF.Control.98)/2",
  # interaction effect at time 98
  "(GroupM.Predator.98 - GroupM.Control.98) - (GroupF.Predator.98 - GroupF.Control.98)"))


```

```{r,98 WGCNA eigen}
# data frame of eigengene module data
Modules.Eig.98 <- t(WGCNA.bw.net.98$MEs)-min(WGCNA.bw.net.98$MEs)

# Module zero is where all genes that are not in a module go so we should remove it
Modules.Eig.98 <- Modules.Eig.98[!(row.names(Modules.Eig.98)) == "ME0",]
```

```{r,98 module genes}
# genes within the modules
Module.Genes.98 <- tibble::enframe(WGCNA.bw.net.98$colors,
                                       name = "Gene_Id", value = "Module")

```


```{r,98 modules eigen}
Modules.Eig.98 <- edgeR::DGEList(counts = Modules.Eig.98,
                                  group = as.factor(colnames((Gene.Filtered %>%
                                                                dplyr::select(contains("98"))))))
```

```{r,98 voom dream}
# estimate weights using linear mixed model of dream
WGCNA.vobjDream.98 <- variancePartition::voomWithDreamWeights(
  Modules.Eig.98,
  Dream.Form, Dream.Meta.98, BPPARAM = Params)
```

```{r,98 dream fit}
# Dream fit
WGCNA.Fit.98 <- variancePartition::dream(WGCNA.vobjDream.98, Dream.Form, Dream.Meta.98,
                                               Dream.Constrast.98, BPPARAM = Params,
                                               ddf = "Kenward-Roger")

# ebayes
WGCNA.Fit.98 <- variancePartition::eBayes(WGCNA.Fit.98)
```

```{r, WGCNA}
WGCNA.DEM.Results.98 <- lapply(X = list(
  # difference between males by treatment at 98
  "GroupM.Predator.98 - GroupM.Control.98",
  # difference between females by treatment at 98
  "GroupF.Predator.98 - GroupF.Control.98",
  # difference between male and female in control at 98
  "GroupM.Control.98 - GroupF.Control.98",
  # difference between male and female in predator at 98
  "GroupM.Predator.98 - GroupF.Predator.98",
  # main sex effect at time 98
  "(GroupM.Predator.98 + GroupM.Control.98 - GroupF.Predator.98 - GroupF.Control.98)/2",
  # main predator effect at time 98
  "(GroupM.Predator.98 - GroupM.Control.98 + GroupF.Predator.98 - GroupF.Control.98)/2",
  # interaction effect at time 98
  "(GroupM.Predator.98 - GroupM.Control.98) - (GroupF.Predator.98 - GroupF.Control.98)"),
  FUN = function(X){
    variancePartition::topTable(WGCNA.Fit.98, 
                                                         coef = X, 
                                                         adjust.method = "BH",
                                                         p.value = 0.05, 
                                                         number = Inf) %>%
      # get gene ID
      tibble::rownames_to_column(., var = "Module") %>%
      dplyr::mutate(Contrast = X)}) %>%
  # bind the list of results together
  dplyr::bind_rows(.)

```

#### DIDNT DO THIS ###
```{r, DME Table with Gene Info}
# make table with all the extra information
DME.98.Results.Info.Table <- Module.Genes.98 %>%
  dplyr::left_join(., biomaRt::getBM(filters = "ensembl_gene_id", attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "external_gene_name", "zfin_id_symbol", "description", "go_id", "definition_1006"),
                                     values =  .$Gene_Id, mart= Gene_Names), by = c("Gene_Id" = "ensembl_gene_id"), multiple  = "all")
```

### Time 144

```{r,144 WGCNA Data Formating}
# Setup DESeq data from count matrix.
WGCNA.Data.Matrix.144 <- DESeq2::DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = (Gene.Filtered %>%
                                                                      dplyr::select(contains("144"))),
                                                       colData = (Sample.Info %>%
                                                                    dplyr::filter(Timepoint == 144)),
                                                       design = ~ 1) %>%
  # normalize
  DESeq2::vst(.) %>%
  # extract normalized ata
  SummarizedExperiment::assay(.) %>%
  # transpose
  t(.)
```

#### Network Contruction

##### Soft Threshold

```{r,144 Pick Soft Threshold}
# create vector of powers
powers <- c(seq(2, 20, by = 1))

# test powers
Soft.Thresh.Df.144 <- WGCNA::pickSoftThreshold(WGCNA.Data.Matrix.144, powerVector = powers, verbose = 5)

# graph thresholds
ggplot((data.frame(Soft.Thresh.Df.144$fitIndices) %>%
          dplyr::mutate(model_fit = -sign(slope) * SFT.R.sq)), aes(x = Power, y = model_fit, label = Power)) +
  # plot points
  geom_point() +
  # labels
  geom_text(nudge_y = 0.1) +
  #  WGCNA recommended as an R^2 cutoff
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.90, col = "red") +
  # labels
  xlab("Soft Threshold (power)") +
  ylab("Scale Free Topology Model Fit, signed R^2") +
  ggtitle("Scale independence") +
  # format 
  theme_classic()

```

##### Build Network

```{r,144 Build Network}
# run WGCNA
WGCNA.bw.net.144 <- WGCNA::blockwiseModules(WGCNA.Data.Matrix.144,
                                        maxBlockSize = 100000,
                                        TOMType = "signed",
                                        power = 5,
                                        numericLabels = TRUE,
                                        randomSeed = 42)

# write to results
readr::write_rds(WGCNA.bw.net.144,
                 file = paste(getwd(), "/Results/WGCNA/WGCNA_results_144.RDS", sep = ""))
```


#### Differential Module Expression

```{r,144 metadata}
# make dream meta data
Dream.Meta.144 <- Sample.Info %>%
  dplyr::filter(Timepoint == 144) %>%
  # male characters
  dplyr::mutate_all(as.character)
```

```{r,144 contrast}
# make contrasts
Dream.Constrast.144 <- variancePartition::makeContrastsDream(Dream.Form, Dream.Meta.144,
                                                                 contrasts = c(
                                                                   # difference between males by treatment at 144
  "GroupM.Predator.144 - GroupM.Control.144",
  # difference between females by treatment at 144
  "GroupF.Predator.144 - GroupF.Control.144",
  # difference between male and female in control at 144
  "GroupM.Control.144 - GroupF.Control.144",
  # difference between male and female in predator at 144
  "GroupM.Predator.144 - GroupF.Predator.144",
  # main sex effect at time 144
  "(GroupM.Predator.144 + GroupM.Control.144 - GroupF.Predator.144 - GroupF.Control.144)/2",
  # main predator effect at time 144
  "(GroupM.Predator.144 - GroupM.Control.144 + GroupF.Predator.144 - GroupF.Control.144)/2",
  # interaction effect at time 144
  "(GroupM.Predator.144 - GroupM.Control.144) - (GroupF.Predator.144 - GroupF.Control.144)"))


```

```{r,144 WGCNA eigen}
# data frame of eigengene module data
Modules.Eig.144 <- t(WGCNA.bw.net.144$MEs)-min(WGCNA.bw.net.144$MEs)

# Module zero is where all genes that are not in a module go so we should remove it
Modules.Eig.144 <- Modules.Eig.144[!(row.names(Modules.Eig.144)) == "ME0",]
```

```{r,144 module genes}
# genes within the modules
Module.Genes.144 <- tibble::enframe(WGCNA.bw.net.144$colors,
                                       name = "Gene_Id", value = "Module")

```


```{r,144 modules eigen}
Modules.Eig.144 <- edgeR::DGEList(counts = Modules.Eig.144,
                                  group = as.factor(colnames((Gene.Filtered %>%
                                                                dplyr::select(contains("144"))))))
```

```{r, voom dream}
# estimate weights using linear mixed model of dream
WGCNA.vobjDream.144 <- variancePartition::voomWithDreamWeights(
  Modules.Eig.144,
  Dream.Form, Dream.Meta.144, BPPARAM = Params)
```

```{r,144 dream fit}
# Dream fit
WGCNA.Fit.144 <- variancePartition::dream(WGCNA.vobjDream.144, Dream.Form, Dream.Meta.144,
                                               Dream.Constrast.144, BPPARAM = Params,
                                               ddf = "Kenward-Roger")

# ebayes
WGCNA.Fit.144 <- variancePartition::eBayes(WGCNA.Fit.144)
```

```{r,144 WGCNA}
WGCNA.DEM.Results.144 <- lapply(X = list(
  # difference between males by treatment at 144
  "GroupM.Predator.144 - GroupM.Control.144",
  # difference between females by treatment at 144
  "GroupF.Predator.144 - GroupF.Control.144",
  # difference between male and female in control at 144
  "GroupM.Control.144 - GroupF.Control.144",
  # difference between male and female in predator at 144
  "GroupM.Predator.144 - GroupF.Predator.144",
  # main sex effect at time 144
  "(GroupM.Predator.144 + GroupM.Control.144 - GroupF.Predator.144 - GroupF.Control.144)/2",
  # main predator effect at time 144
  "(GroupM.Predator.144 - GroupM.Control.144 + GroupF.Predator.144 - GroupF.Control.144)/2",
  # interaction effect at time 144
  "(GroupM.Predator.144 - GroupM.Control.144) - (GroupF.Predator.144 - GroupF.Control.144)"),
  FUN = function(X){
    variancePartition::topTable(WGCNA.Fit.144, 
                                                         coef = X, 
                                                         adjust.method = "BH",
                                                         p.value = 0.05, 
                                                         number = Inf) %>%
      # get gene ID
      tibble::rownames_to_column(., var = "Module") %>%
      dplyr::mutate(Contrast = X)}) %>%
  # bind the list of results together
  dplyr::bind_rows(.)

```

#### DID not do this
```{r,144 DME Table with Gene Info}
# make table with all the extra information
DME.144.Results.Info.Table <- Module.Genes.144 %>%
  dplyr::left_join(., biomaRt::getBM(filters = "ensembl_gene_id", attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "external_gene_name", "zfin_id_symbol", "description", "go_id", "definition_1006"),
                                     values =  .$Gene_Id, mart= Gene_Names), by = c("Gene_Id" = "ensembl_gene_id"), multiple  = "all")
```

### Time 240

```{r,240 WGCNA Data Formating}
# Setup DESeq data from count matrix.
WGCNA.Data.Matrix.240 <- DESeq2::DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = (Gene.Filtered %>%
                                                                      dplyr::select(contains("240"))),
                                                       colData = (Sample.Info %>%
                                                                    dplyr::filter(Timepoint == 240)),
                                                       design = ~ 1) %>%
  # normalize
  DESeq2::vst(.) %>%
  # extract normalized ata
  SummarizedExperiment::assay(.) %>%
  # transpose
  t(.)
```

#### Network Contruction

##### Soft Threshold

```{r,240 Pick Soft Threshold}
# create vector of powers
powers <- c(seq(2, 20, by = 1))

# test powers
Soft.Thresh.Df.240 <- WGCNA::pickSoftThreshold(WGCNA.Data.Matrix.240, powerVector = powers, verbose = 5)

# graph thresholds
ggplot((data.frame(Soft.Thresh.Df.240$fitIndices) %>%
          dplyr::mutate(model_fit = -sign(slope) * SFT.R.sq)), aes(x = Power, y = model_fit, label = Power)) +
  # plot points
  geom_point() +
  # labels
  geom_text(nudge_y = 0.1) +
  #  WGCNA recommended as an R^2 cutoff
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.90, col = "red") +
  # labels
  xlab("Soft Threshold (power)") +
  ylab("Scale Free Topology Model Fit, signed R^2") +
  ggtitle("Scale independence") +
  # format 
  theme_classic()

```
#### Build Network

```{r,240 Build Network}
# run WGCNA
WGCNA.bw.net.240 <- WGCNA::blockwiseModules(WGCNA.Data.Matrix.240,
                                        maxBlockSize = 100000,
                                        TOMType = "signed",
                                        power = 14,
                                        numericLabels = TRUE,
                                        randomSeed = 42)

# write to results
readr::write_rds(WGCNA.bw.net.240,
                 file = paste(getwd(), "/Results/WGCNA/WGCNA_results_240.RDS", sep = ""))
```


#### Differential Module Expression

```{r,240 metadata}
# make dream meta data
Dream.Meta.240 <- Sample.Info %>%
  dplyr::filter(Timepoint == 240) %>%
  # male characters
  dplyr::mutate_all(as.character)
```

```{r,240 contrast}
# make contrasts
Dream.Constrast.240 <- variancePartition::makeContrastsDream(Dream.Form, Dream.Meta.240,
                                                                 contrasts = c(
                                                                   # difference between males by treatment at 240
  "GroupM.Predator.240 - GroupM.Control.240",
  # difference between females by treatment at 240
  "GroupF.Predator.240 - GroupF.Control.240",
  # difference between male and female in control at 240
  "GroupM.Control.240 - GroupF.Control.240",
  # difference between male and female in predator at 144
  "GroupM.Predator.240 - GroupF.Predator.240",
  # main sex effect at time 240
  "(GroupM.Predator.240 + GroupM.Control.240 - GroupF.Predator.240 - GroupF.Control.240)/2",
  # main predator effect at time 240
  "(GroupM.Predator.240 - GroupM.Control.240 + GroupF.Predator.240 - GroupF.Control.240)/2",
  # interaction effect at time 240
  "(GroupM.Predator.240 - GroupM.Control.240) - (GroupF.Predator.240 - GroupF.Control.240)"))


```

```{r,240 WGCNA eigen}
# data frame of eigengene module data
Modules.Eig.240 <- t(WGCNA.bw.net.240$MEs)-min(WGCNA.bw.net.240$MEs)

# Module zero is where all genes that are not in a module go so we should remove it
Modules.Eig.240 <- Modules.Eig.240[!(row.names(Modules.Eig.240)) == "ME0",]
```

```{r,240 module genes}
# genes within the modules
Module.Genes.240 <- tibble::enframe(WGCNA.bw.net.240$colors,
                                       name = "Gene_Id", value = "Module")

```


```{r,240 modules eigen}
Modules.Eig.240 <- edgeR::DGEList(counts = Modules.Eig.240,
                                  group = as.factor(colnames((Gene.Filtered %>%
                                                                dplyr::select(contains("240"))))))
```

```{r,240 voom dream}
# estimate weights using linear mixed model of dream
WGCNA.vobjDream.240 <- variancePartition::voomWithDreamWeights(
  Modules.Eig.240,
  Dream.Form, Dream.Meta.240, BPPARAM = Params)
```

```{r,240 dream fit}
# Dream fit
WGCNA.Fit.240 <- variancePartition::dream(WGCNA.vobjDream.240, Dream.Form, Dream.Meta.240,
                                               Dream.Constrast.240, BPPARAM = Params,
                                               ddf = "Kenward-Roger")

# ebayes
WGCNA.Fit.240 <- variancePartition::eBayes(WGCNA.Fit.240)
```

```{r,240 WGCNA}
WGCNA.DEM.Results.240 <- lapply(X = list(
  # difference between males by treatment at 240
  "GroupM.Predator.240 - GroupM.Control.240",
  # difference between females by treatment at 240
  "GroupF.Predator.240 - GroupF.Control.240",
  # difference between male and female in control at 144
  "GroupM.Control.240 - GroupF.Control.240",
  # difference between male and female in predator at 144
  "GroupM.Predator.240 - GroupF.Predator.240",
  # main sex effect at time 240
  "(GroupM.Predator.240 + GroupM.Control.240 - GroupF.Predator.240 - GroupF.Control.240)/2",
  # main predator effect at time 240
  "(GroupM.Predator.240 - GroupM.Control.240 + GroupF.Predator.240 - GroupF.Control.240)/2",
  # interaction effect at time 240
  "(GroupM.Predator.240 - GroupM.Control.240) - (GroupF.Predator.240 - GroupF.Control.240)"),
  FUN = function(X){
    variancePartition::topTable(WGCNA.Fit.240, 
                                                         coef = X, 
                                                         adjust.method = "BH",
                                                         p.value = 0.05, 
                                                         number = Inf) %>%
      # get gene ID
      tibble::rownames_to_column(., var = "Module") %>%
      dplyr::mutate(Contrast = X)}) %>%
  # bind the list of results together
  dplyr::bind_rows(.)

```

#### Did not do this
```{r, DME Table with Gene Info}
# make table with all the extra information
DME.240.Results.Info.Table <- Module.Genes.240 %>%
  dplyr::left_join(., biomaRt::getBM(filters = "ensembl_gene_id", attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "external_gene_name", "zfin_id_symbol", "description", "go_id", "definition_1006"),
                                     values =  .$Gene_Id, mart= Gene_Names), by = c("Gene_Id" = "ensembl_gene_id"), multiple  = "all")
```

### DID NOT DO THIS
## Timepoint Table

```{r, DME Table with Gene Info}
# make table with all the extra information
DME.Timepoint.Results.Info.Table <- list(
  M48 = WGCNA.bw.net.48,
  M98 = WGCNA.bw.net.98,
  M144 = WGCNA.bw.net.144,
  M240 = WGCNA.bw.net.240) %>%
  lapply(X = ., FUN = function(x){
    x$colors %>%
       tibble::enframe(., name = "gene", value = "module") %>%
      dplyr::mutate(module = paste0("ME", module))}) %>%
  dplyr::bind_rows(., .id = "Model") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Model = readr::parse_number(Model)) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(., biomaRt::getBM(filters = "ensembl_gene_id", attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "external_gene_name", "zfin_id_symbol", "description", "go_id", "definition_1006"),
                                     values =  .$gene, mart= Gene_Names), by = c("gene" = "ensembl_gene_id"), multiple  = "all")
```

## GO Enrichment

```{r, Background Genes}
BG.Genes <- (Gene.Filtered %>%
               tibble::rownames_to_column("Gene_Id"))$Gene_Id
```

## DGE

```{r, set up list}
DGE.Sig.List <- DGE.Dream.Results %>%
  dplyr::group_split(Contrast) %>%
  purrr::set_names(DGE.Dream.Results$Contrast %>%
                     unique(.) %>% 
                     sort(.))
```

```{r, GO Terms for DEG}
GO.DGE <- lapply(DGE.Sig.List, FUN = function(x){
  gprofiler2::gost(x$Gene_Id, organism = "gaculeatus", ordered_query = FALSE,
                   multi_query = FALSE ,significant = TRUE, exclude_iea = FALSE, 
                   measure_underrepresentation = FALSE, evcodes = TRUE, 
                   user_threshold = 0.05, correction_method = "fdr", 
                   domain_scope = "custom", custom_bg = BG.Genes,
                   numeric_ns = "", sources = NULL, as_short_link = FALSE)
})
```

```{r, DGE GO Table}
DGE.GO.Terms.All <- lapply(GO.DGE, FUN = function(x)
  {if(length(x) > 0){
    return(x$result)}}) %>%
   dplyr::bind_rows(., .id = "Contrast") %>%
  dplyr::select(-query, -significant, -precision, -recall, -effective_domain_size, -evidence_codes, -intersection)
```
## DME

### Global

```{r, Module Genes}
Module.Genes <- tibble::enframe(WGCNA.bw.net$colors, name = "gene", value = "module") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(module = paste0("ME", module))
```

```{r, module genes list}
Module.Gene.List <- Module.Genes %>%
  dplyr::group_split(module) %>%
  purrr::set_names(Module.Genes$module %>%
                     unique(.) %>% 
                     sort(.))
```

```{r, GO Modules}
GO.Modules <- lapply(Module.Gene.List, FUN = function(x){
  gprofiler2::gost(x$gene, organism = "gaculeatus", ordered_query = FALSE,
                   multi_query = FALSE ,significant = TRUE, exclude_iea = FALSE, 
                   measure_underrepresentation = FALSE, evcodes = TRUE, 
                   user_threshold = 0.05, correction_method = "fdr", 
                   domain_scope = "custom", custom_bg = BG.Genes,
                   numeric_ns = "", sources = NULL, as_short_link = FALSE)
})

```

```{r, GO MOdules Table}
GO.Modules.Table <- lapply(GO.Modules, function(x){if(length(x) > 0){
  return(x$result)}
}) %>%
  do.call(rbind, .) %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column(., var = "Module") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Module = gsub("\\..*", "", Module)) %>%
  dplyr::select(-query, -significant, -precision, -recall, -effective_domain_size, -evidence_codes, -intersection)

```
### Timepoint Specific

```{r, timepoint specific module GO}

Module.GO.Timepoints <- list(
  M48 = WGCNA.bw.net.48,
  M98 = WGCNA.bw.net.98,
  M144 = WGCNA.bw.net.144,
  M240 = WGCNA.bw.net.240) %>%
  lapply(X = ., FUN = function(x){
    x$colors %>%
       tibble::enframe(., name = "gene", value = "module") %>%
      dplyr::mutate(module = paste0("ME", module))}) %>%
  lapply(X = ., FUN = function(x){
    x %>%
      dplyr::group_split(module) %>%
      purrr::set_names(x$module %>%
                         unique(.) %>%
                         sort(.))}) %>%
  lapply(X = ., FUN = function(x){
    x %>%
      lapply(X = ., FUN = function(x){
        gprofiler2::gost(x$gene, organism = "gaculeatus", ordered_query = FALSE,
                         multi_query = FALSE ,significant = TRUE, exclude_iea = FALSE, 
                         measure_underrepresentation = FALSE, evcodes = TRUE, 
                         user_threshold = 0.05, correction_method = "fdr", 
                         domain_scope = "custom", custom_bg = BG.Genes,
                         numeric_ns = "", sources = NULL, as_short_link = FALSE)})})

```

### got to fix this
```{r, Timepoint Specific GO table}
Module.GO.Timepoints.Table <- Module.GO.Timepoints %>%
  lapply(., function(x){
    lapply(x, function(y){
      if(length(y) > 0){
        return(y$result)}}) %>%
      do.call(rbind, .) %>%
      tibble::rownames_to_column(., var = "Module") %>%
      dplyr::mutate(Module = gsub("\\..*", "", Module))}) %>%
  do.call(rbind, .) %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column(., var = "Timepoint") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Timepoint = readr::parse_number(Timepoint)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Timepoint = as.numeric(gsub("\\..*", "", as.character(Timepoint)))) %>%
  dplyr::select(-query, -significant, -precision, -recall, -effective_domain_size, -evidence_codes, -intersection)

```

# Differential Transcript Usage

## Overall Treatment Effect

### Sexes Combined

#### Import Data
```{r,Treament Global DTU Import Data}
# import data
Iso.Treat.Global.Quant <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::importIsoformExpression(
  parentDir = paste0(getwd(), "/Expression/"),
  readLength = 100,
  addIsofomIdAsColumn = TRUE)

# Make design matrix
Iso.Treat.Global.Design <- Sample.Info %>%
  # make sample column
  tibble::rownames_to_column(., var = "Sample") %>%
  # select what we need
  dplyr::select(Sample, Treatment, Sex) %>%
  # rename
  dplyr::rename("sampleID" = Sample,
                "condition" = Treatment) %>%
  # fix sampleId
  dplyr::mutate(sampleID = gsub('\\.', '-', sampleID)) 
```

#### Formating
```{r,DTU Treatment Global SwitchList}

# make swtichlist
Treat.Global.SwitchList <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::importRdata(
  isoformCountMatrix = Iso.Treat.Global.Quant$counts,
  isoformRepExpression = Iso.Treat.Global.Quant$abundance,
  designMatrix = Iso.Treat.Global.Design,
  isoformExonAnnoation = paste0(getwd(), "/Genome/no_genes_genomic.gtf"),
  isoformNtFasta = paste0(getwd(), "/Genome/rna.fa"),
  fixStringTieAnnotationProblem = TRUE,
    showProgress = FALSE)

# Filter Switch List
Treat.Global.SwitchListFiltered <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::preFilter(Treat.Global.SwitchList,
                                                                    geneExpressionCutoff = 5,
                                                                    isoformExpressionCutoff = 1,
                                                                    removeSingleIsoformGenes = TRUE)
```

#### Analysis
```{r,DTU Treatment Global Analysis}
# analyize switch list
Treat.Global.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::isoformSwitchTestDEXSeq(
  switchAnalyzeRlist = Treat.Global.SwitchListFiltered,
  reduceToSwitchingGenes=TRUE)

IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::extractSwitchSummary(Treat.Global.SwitchListAnalyzed)
```

#### Extract Sequences
```{r, Treatment Global Extract Sequences}
Treat.Global.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::extractSequence(
  Treat.Global.SwitchListAnalyzed,
  pathToOutput = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/Global/Sexes_Combined"))
```

#### Add External Predictions
```{r, Treatment Global Add Predictions}
# cpc2
Treat.Global.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeCPC2(
  switchAnalyzeRlist   = Treat.Global.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToCPC2resultFile  = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/Global/Sexes_Combined/result_cpc2.txt"),
    codingCutoff         = 0.725, # the coding potential cutoff we suggested for human
    removeNoncodinORFs   = FALSE)

# PFAM not working right now
Treat.Global.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzePFAM(
  switchAnalyzeRlist = Treat.Global.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToPFAMresultFile = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/Global/Sexes_Combined/result_pfam.txt"))

# Add SignalP analysis
Treat.Global.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeSignalP(
    switchAnalyzeRlist       = Treat.Global.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToSignalPresultFile  = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/Global/prediction_results.txt"))

# Add DeepLoc2 analysis
Treat.Global.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeDeepLoc2(
    switchAnalyzeRlist = Treat.Global.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToDeepLoc2resultFile = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/Global/DeepLoc2.csv"),
    quiet = FALSE)

# Add DeepTMHMM analysis
Treat.Global.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeDeepTMHMM(
    switchAnalyzeRlist   = Treat.Global.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToDeepTMHMMresultFile =  paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/Global/TMRs.gff3"),
    showProgress=FALSE)


### Add NetsurfP-2 analysis
Treat.Global.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeNetSurfP2(
    switchAnalyzeRlist        = Treat.Global.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToNetSurfP2resultFile = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/Global/NetSurfP2.csv"),
    showProgress = FALSE)
```

```{r, Global Alternative Splicing}
# alternative splicing
Treat.Global.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeAlternativeSplicing(
    switchAnalyzeRlist = Treat.Global.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    quiet=TRUE)

```

#### Consequencese
```{r, Global Consequences}
# consequences
consequencesOfInterest <- c('tss',
                            'tts',
                            'last_exon',
                            'isoform_seq_similarity',
                            'isoform_length',
                            'exon_number',
                            'intron_structure',
                            'intron_retention',
                            'isoform_class_code',
                            'coding_potential',
                            'ORF_seq_similarity',
                            'ORF_genomic',
                            'ORF_length',
                            '5_utr_seq_similarity',
                            '5_utr_length',
                            '3_utr_seq_similarity',
                            '3_utr_length',
                            'NMD_status',
                            'domains_identified',
                            'domain_isotype',
                            'domain_length',
                            'genomic_domain_position',
                            'IDR_identified',
                            'IDR_length',
                            'IDR_type',
                            'sub_cell_location',
                            'sub_cell_shift_to_cell_membrane',
                            'sub_cell_shift_to_cytoplasm',
                            'sub_cell_shift_to_nucleus',
                            'sub_cell_shift_to_Extracellular',
                            'isoform_topology',
                            'extracellular_region_count',
                            'intracellular_region_count',
                            'extracellular_region_length',
                            'intracellular_region_length')


Treat.Global.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeSwitchConsequences(
    Treat.Global.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    consequencesToAnalyze = consequencesOfInterest, 
    dIFcutoff = 0.1, 
    showProgress=FALSE)

IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::extractSwitchSummary(Treat.Global.SwitchListAnalyzed, dIFcutoff = 0.1, filterForConsequences = TRUE)

IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::extractTopSwitches(
    Treat.Global.SwitchListAnalyzed, 
    filterForConsequences = TRUE, 
    n = NA, 
    sortByQvals = TRUE)

switchPlot(Treat.Global.SwitchListAnalyzed, gene = 'itgb1bp1')

switchPlot(Treat.Global.SwitchListAnalyzed, gene = 'cep55l')
```




### Male

#### Import Data
```{r,Treament Male Global DTU Import Data}
# import data
Iso.Treat.Male.Quant <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::importIsoformExpression(
  parentDir = paste0(getwd(), "/Expression/"),
  pattern = "M",
  readLength = 100,
  addIsofomIdAsColumn = TRUE)

# Make design matrix
Iso.Treat.Male.Design <- Sample.Info %>%
  # make sample column
  tibble::rownames_to_column(., var = "Sample") %>%
  # filter
  dplyr::filter(Sex == "M") %>%
  # select what we need
  dplyr::select(Sample, Treatment) %>%
  # rename
  dplyr::rename("sampleID" = Sample,
                "condition" = Treatment) %>%
  # fix sampleId
  dplyr::mutate(sampleID = gsub('\\.', '-', sampleID))
  
```

#### Formating
```{r,DTU Treatment Global SwitchList}

# make swtichlist
Treat.Global.Male.SwitchList <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::importRdata(
  isoformCountMatrix = Iso.Treat.Male.Quant$counts,
  isoformRepExpression = Iso.Treat.Male.Quant$abundance,
  designMatrix = Iso.Treat.Male.Design,
  isoformExonAnnoation = paste0(getwd(), "/Genome/no_genes_genomic.gtf"),
  isoformNtFasta = paste0(getwd(), "/Genome/rna.fa"),
  fixStringTieAnnotationProblem = TRUE,
    showProgress = FALSE)

# Filter Switch List
Treat.Global.Male.SwitchListFiltered <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::preFilter(Treat.Global.Male.SwitchList,
                                                                    geneExpressionCutoff = 5,
                                                                    isoformExpressionCutoff = 1,
                                                                    removeSingleIsoformGenes = TRUE)
```

#### Analysis
Objects do not exist because there were so significant results
```{r,DTU Treatment Global Analysis}
# analyize switch list
Treat.Global.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::isoformSwitchTestDEXSeq(
  switchAnalyzeRlist = Treat.Global.Male.SwitchListFiltered,
  reduceToSwitchingGenes=TRUE)

IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::extractSwitchSummary(Treat.Global.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed)
```

### Female

#### Import Data
```{r,Treament Female Global DTU Import Data}
# import data
Iso.Treat.Female.Quant <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::importIsoformExpression(
  parentDir = paste0(getwd(), "/Expression/"),
  pattern = "F",
  readLength = 100,
  addIsofomIdAsColumn = TRUE)

# Make design matrix
Iso.Treat.Female.Design <- Sample.Info %>%
  # make sample column
  tibble::rownames_to_column(., var = "Sample") %>%
  # filter
  dplyr::filter(Sex == "F") %>%
  # select what we need
  dplyr::select(Sample, Treatment) %>%
  # rename
  dplyr::rename("sampleID" = Sample,
                "condition" = Treatment) %>%
  # fix sampleId
  dplyr::mutate(sampleID = gsub('\\.', '-', sampleID))
  
```

#### Formating
```{r,DTU Treatment Global Fremale SwitchList}

# make swtichlist
Treat.Global.Female.SwitchList <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::importRdata(
  isoformCountMatrix = Iso.Treat.Female.Quant$counts,
  isoformRepExpression = Iso.Treat.Female.Quant$abundance,
  designMatrix = Iso.Treat.Female.Design,
  isoformExonAnnoation = paste0(getwd(), "/Genome/no_genes_genomic.gtf"),
  isoformNtFasta = paste0(getwd(), "/Genome/rna.fa"),
  fixStringTieAnnotationProblem = TRUE,
    showProgress = FALSE)

# Filter Switch List
Treat.Global.Female.SwitchListFiltered <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::preFilter(Treat.Global.Female.SwitchList,
                                                                    geneExpressionCutoff = 5,
                                                                    isoformExpressionCutoff = 1,
                                                                    removeSingleIsoformGenes = TRUE)
```

#### Analysis
No significant results so object does not exist
```{r,DTU Treatment Global Female Analysis}
# analyize switch list
Treat.Global.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::isoformSwitchTestDEXSeq(
  switchAnalyzeRlist = Treat.Global.Female.SwitchListFiltered,
  reduceToSwitchingGenes=TRUE)

IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::extractSwitchSummary(Treat.Global.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed)
```

## Treament Effect at 48

### Sexes Combined

#### Import Data
```{r,Treatment 48 DTU Import Data}
# import data
Iso.Treat.48.Quant <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::importIsoformExpression(
  parentDir = paste0(getwd(), "/Expression/"),
  pattern = "48",
  readLength = 100,
  addIsofomIdAsColumn = TRUE)

# Make design matrix
Iso.Treat.48.Design <- Sample.Info %>%
  # make sample column
  tibble::rownames_to_column(., var = "Sample") %>%
  # filter
  dplyr::filter(Timepoint == "48") %>%
  # select what we need
  dplyr::select(Sample, Treatment, Sex) %>%
  # rename
  dplyr::rename("sampleID" = Sample,
                "condition" = Treatment) %>%
  # fix sampleId
  dplyr::mutate(sampleID = gsub('\\.', '-', sampleID)) 
```

#### Formating
```{r,DTU Treatment 48 SwitchList}

# make swtichlist
Treat.48.SwitchList <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::importRdata(
  isoformCountMatrix = Iso.Treat.48.Quant$counts,
  isoformRepExpression = Iso.Treat.48.Quant$abundance,
  designMatrix = Iso.Treat.48.Design,
  isoformExonAnnoation = paste0(getwd(), "/Genome/no_genes_genomic.gtf"),
  isoformNtFasta = paste0(getwd(), "/Genome/rna.fa"),
  fixStringTieAnnotationProblem = TRUE,
    showProgress = FALSE)

# Filter Switch List
Treat.48.SwitchListFiltered <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::preFilter(Treat.48.SwitchList,
                                                                    geneExpressionCutoff = 5,
                                                                    isoformExpressionCutoff = 1,
                                                                    removeSingleIsoformGenes = TRUE)
```

#### Analysis
No significant results so object does not exist
```{r,DTU 48 Global Analysis}
# analyize switch list
Treat.48.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::isoformSwitchTestDEXSeq(
  switchAnalyzeRlist = Treat.48.SwitchListFiltered,
  reduceToSwitchingGenes=TRUE)

IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::extractSwitchSummary(Treat.48.SwitchListAnalyzed)

```




### Male

#### Import Data
```{r,Treament Male 48 DTU Import Data}
# import data
Iso.Treat.48.Male.Quant <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::importIsoformExpression(
  parentDir = paste0(getwd(), "/Expression/"),
  pattern = "48M",
  readLength = 100,
  addIsofomIdAsColumn = TRUE)

# Make design matrix
Iso.Treat.48.Male.Design <- Sample.Info %>%
  # make sample column
  tibble::rownames_to_column(., var = "Sample") %>%
  # filter
  dplyr::filter(Sex == "M" & Timepoint == 48) %>%
  # select what we need
  dplyr::select(Sample, Treatment) %>%
  # rename
  dplyr::rename("sampleID" = Sample,
                "condition" = Treatment) %>%
  # fix sampleId
  dplyr::mutate(sampleID = gsub('\\.', '-', sampleID))
  
```

#### Formating
```{r,DTU Treatment 48 SwitchList}

# make swtichlist
Treat.48.Male.SwitchList <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::importRdata(
  isoformCountMatrix = Iso.Treat.48.Male.Quant$counts,
  isoformRepExpression = Iso.Treat.48.Male.Quant$abundance,
  designMatrix = Iso.Treat.48.Male.Design,
  isoformExonAnnoation = paste0(getwd(), "/Genome/no_genes_genomic.gtf"),
  isoformNtFasta = paste0(getwd(), "/Genome/rna.fa"),
  fixStringTieAnnotationProblem = TRUE,
    showProgress = FALSE)

# Filter Switch List
Treat.48.Male.SwitchListFiltered <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::preFilter(Treat.48.Male.SwitchList,
                                                                    geneExpressionCutoff = 5,
                                                                    isoformExpressionCutoff = 1,
                                                                    removeSingleIsoformGenes = TRUE)
```

#### Analysis
```{r,DTU Treatment 48 Analysis}
# analyize switch list
Treat.48.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::isoformSwitchTestDEXSeq(
  switchAnalyzeRlist = Treat.48.Male.SwitchListFiltered,
  reduceToSwitchingGenes=TRUE)

IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::extractSwitchSummary(Treat.48.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed)
```

#### Extract Sequences
```{r, Treatment 48 Extract Sequences}
Treat.48.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::extractSequence(
  Treat.48.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed,
  pathToOutput = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/48/Male"))
```

#### Add External Predictions
```{r, Treatment 48 Add Predictions}
# cpc2
Treat.48.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeCPC2(
  switchAnalyzeRlist   = Treat.48.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToCPC2resultFile  = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/48/Male/result_cpc2.txt"),
    codingCutoff         = 0.725, # the coding potential cutoff we suggested for human
    removeNoncodinORFs   = FALSE)

# PFAM not working right now
Treat.48.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzePFAM(
  switchAnalyzeRlist = Treat.48.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToPFAMresultFile = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/48/Male/result_pfam.txt"))

# Add SignalP analysis
Treat.48.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeSignalP(
    switchAnalyzeRlist       = Treat.48.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToSignalPresultFile  = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/48/Male/prediction_results.txt"))

# Add DeepLoc2 analysis
Treat.48.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeDeepLoc2(
    switchAnalyzeRlist = Treat.48.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToDeepLoc2resultFile = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/48/Male/DeepLoc2.csv"),
    quiet = FALSE)

# Add DeepTMHMM analysis
Treat.48.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeDeepTMHMM(
    switchAnalyzeRlist   = Treat.48.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToDeepTMHMMresultFile =  paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/48/Male/TMRs.gff3"),
    showProgress=FALSE)


### Add NetsurfP-2 analysis
Treat.48.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeNetSurfP2(
    switchAnalyzeRlist        = Treat.48.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed,
```
