    pathToNetSurfP2resultFile = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/48/Male/NetSurfP2.csv"),
    showProgress = FALSE)
```

```{r, 48 Alternative Splicing}
# alternative splicing
Treat.48.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeAlternativeSplicing(
    switchAnalyzeRlist = Treat.48.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    quiet=TRUE)

```


#### Consequences
```{r, 48 Consequences}
# consequences
consequencesOfInterest <- c('tss',
                            'tts',
                            'last_exon',
                            'isoform_seq_similarity',
                            'isoform_length',
                            'exon_number',
                            'intron_structure',
                            'intron_retention',
                            'isoform_class_code',
                            'coding_potential',
                            'ORF_seq_similarity',
                            'ORF_genomic',
                            'ORF_length',
                            '5_utr_seq_similarity',
                            '5_utr_length',
                            '3_utr_seq_similarity',
                            '3_utr_length',
                            'NMD_status',
                            'domains_identified',
                            'domain_isotype',
                            'domain_length',
                            'genomic_domain_position',
                            'IDR_identified',
                            'IDR_length',
                            'IDR_type',
                            'sub_cell_location',
                            'sub_cell_shift_to_cell_membrane',
                            'sub_cell_shift_to_cytoplasm',
                            'sub_cell_shift_to_nucleus',
                            'sub_cell_shift_to_Extracellular',
                            'isoform_topology',
                            'extracellular_region_count',
                            'intracellular_region_count',
                            'extracellular_region_length',
                            'intracellular_region_length')


Treat.98.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeSwitchConsequences(
    Treat.98.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    consequencesToAnalyze = consequencesOfInterest, 
    dIFcutoff = 0.1, 
    showProgress=FALSE)

IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::extractSwitchSummary(Treat.98.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed, dIFcutoff = 0.1, filterForConsequences = TRUE)

IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::extractTopSwitches(
    Treat.98.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed, 
    filterForConsequences = TRUE, 
    n = NA, 
    sortByQvals = TRUE)

switchPlot(Treat.98.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed, gene = 'eml5')

```

### Female

#### Import Data
```{r,Treament Female 48 DTU Import Data}
# import data
Iso.Treat.48.Female.Quant <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::importIsoformExpression(
  parentDir = paste0(getwd(), "/Expression/"),
  pattern = "48F",
  readLength = 100,
  addIsofomIdAsColumn = TRUE)

# Make design matrix
Iso.Treat.48.Female.Design <- Sample.Info %>%
  # make sample column
  tibble::rownames_to_column(., var = "Sample") %>%
  # filter
  dplyr::filter(Sex == "F" & Timepoint == 48) %>%
  # select what we need
  dplyr::select(Sample, Treatment) %>%
  # rename
  dplyr::rename("sampleID" = Sample,
                "condition" = Treatment) %>%
  # fix sampleId
  dplyr::mutate(sampleID = gsub('\\.', '-', sampleID))
  
```

#### Formating
```{r,DTU Treatment 48 Female SwitchList}

# make swtichlist
Treat.48.Female.SwitchList <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::importRdata(
  isoformCountMatrix = Iso.Treat.48.Female.Quant$counts,
  isoformRepExpression = Iso.Treat.48.Female.Quant$abundance,
  designMatrix = Iso.Treat.48.Female.Design,
  isoformExonAnnoation = paste0(getwd(), "/Genome/no_genes_genomic.gtf"),
  isoformNtFasta = paste0(getwd(), "/Genome/rna.fa"),
  fixStringTieAnnotationProblem = TRUE,
    showProgress = FALSE)

# Filter Switch List
Treat.48.Female.SwitchListFiltered <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::preFilter(Treat.48.Female.SwitchList,
                                                                    geneExpressionCutoff = 5,
                                                                    isoformExpressionCutoff = 1,
                                                                    removeSingleIsoformGenes = TRUE)
```

#### Analysis
No significant results so the object does not exist
```{r,DTU Treatment 48 Female Analysis}
# analyize switch list
Treat.48.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::isoformSwitchTestDEXSeq(
  switchAnalyzeRlist = Treat.48.Female.SwitchListFiltered,
  reduceToSwitchingGenes=TRUE)

IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::extractSwitchSummary(Treat.48.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed)
```

## Treament Effect at 98

### Sexes Combined 
#### Import Data
```{r,Treatment 98 DTU Import Data}
# import data
Iso.Treat.98.Quant <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::importIsoformExpression(
  parentDir = paste0(getwd(), "/Expression/"),
  pattern = "98",
  readLength = 100,
  addIsofomIdAsColumn = TRUE)

# Make design matrix
Iso.Treat.98.Design <- Sample.Info %>%
  # make sample column
  tibble::rownames_to_column(., var = "Sample") %>%
  # filter
  dplyr::filter(Timepoint == "98") %>%
  # select what we need
  dplyr::select(Sample, Treatment, Sex) %>%
  # rename
  dplyr::rename("sampleID" = Sample,
                "condition" = Treatment) %>%
  # fix sampleId
  dplyr::mutate(sampleID = gsub('\\.', '-', sampleID)) 
```

#### Formating
```{r,DTU Treatment 98 SwitchList}

# make swtichlist
Treat.98.SwitchList <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::importRdata(
  isoformCountMatrix = Iso.Treat.98.Quant$counts,
  isoformRepExpression = Iso.Treat.98.Quant$abundance,
  designMatrix = Iso.Treat.98.Design,
  isoformExonAnnoation = paste0(getwd(), "/Genome/no_genes_genomic.gtf"),
  isoformNtFasta = paste0(getwd(), "/Genome/rna.fa"),
  fixStringTieAnnotationProblem = TRUE,
    showProgress = FALSE)

# Filter Switch List
Treat.98.SwitchListFiltered <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::preFilter(Treat.98.SwitchList,
                                                                    geneExpressionCutoff = 5,
                                                                    isoformExpressionCutoff = 1,
                                                                    removeSingleIsoformGenes = TRUE)
```

#### Analysis
```{r,DTU 98 Global Analysis}
# analyize switch list
Treat.98.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::isoformSwitchTestDEXSeq(
  switchAnalyzeRlist = Treat.98.SwitchListFiltered,
  reduceToSwitchingGenes=TRUE)

IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::extractSwitchSummary(Treat.98.SwitchListAnalyzed)

```

#### Extract Sequences
```{r, Treatment 98 Extract Sequences}
Treat.98.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::extractSequence(
  Treat.98.SwitchListAnalyzed,
  pathToOutput = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/98/Sexes_Combined/"))
```


#### Add External Predictions
```{r, Treatment 98 Add Predictions}
# cpc2
Treat.98.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeCPC2(
  switchAnalyzeRlist   = Treat.98.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToCPC2resultFile  = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/98/Sexes_Combined/result_cpc2.txt"),
    codingCutoff         = 0.725, # the coding potential cutoff we suggested for human
    removeNoncodinORFs   = FALSE)

# PFAM not working right now
Treat.98.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzePFAM(
  switchAnalyzeRlist = Treat.98.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToPFAMresultFile = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/98/Sexes_Combined/result_pfam.txt"))

# Add SignalP analysis
Treat.98.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeSignalP(
    switchAnalyzeRlist       = Treat.98.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToSignalPresultFile  = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/98/Sexes_Combined/prediction_results.txt"))

# Add DeepLoc2 analysis
Treat.98.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeDeepLoc2(
    switchAnalyzeRlist = Treat.98.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToDeepLoc2resultFile = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/98/Sexes_Combined/DeepLoc2.csv"),
    quiet = FALSE)

# Add DeepTMHMM analysis
Treat.98.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeDeepTMHMM(
    switchAnalyzeRlist   = Treat.98.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToDeepTMHMMresultFile =  paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/98/Sexes_Combined/TMRs.gff3"),
    showProgress=FALSE)

### Add NetsurfP-2 analysis
Treat.98.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeNetSurfP2(
    switchAnalyzeRlist        = Treat.98.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToNetSurfP2resultFile = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/98/Sexes_Combined/NetSurfP2.csv"),
    showProgress = FALSE)
```

```{r, 98 Alternative Splicing}
# alternative splicing
Treat.98.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeAlternativeSplicing(
    switchAnalyzeRlist = Treat.144.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    quiet=TRUE)

```


#### Consequences
```{r, 98 Consequences}
# consequences
consequencesOfInterest <- c('tss',
                            'tts',
                            'last_exon',
                            'isoform_seq_similarity',
                            'isoform_length',
                            'exon_number',
                            'intron_structure',
                            'intron_retention',
                            'isoform_class_code',
                            'coding_potential',
                            'ORF_seq_similarity',
                            'ORF_genomic',
                            'ORF_length',
                            '5_utr_seq_similarity',
                            '5_utr_length',
                            '3_utr_seq_similarity',
                            '3_utr_length',
                            'NMD_status',
                            'domains_identified',
                            'domain_isotype',
                            'domain_length',
                            'genomic_domain_position',
                            'IDR_identified',
                            'IDR_length',
                            'IDR_type',
                            'sub_cell_location',
                            'sub_cell_shift_to_cell_membrane',
                            'sub_cell_shift_to_cytoplasm',
                            'sub_cell_shift_to_nucleus',
                            'sub_cell_shift_to_Extracellular',
                            'isoform_topology',
                            'extracellular_region_count',
                            'intracellular_region_count',
                            'extracellular_region_length',
                            'intracellular_region_length')


Treat.98.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeSwitchConsequences(
    Treat.98.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    consequencesToAnalyze = consequencesOfInterest, 
    dIFcutoff = 0.1, 
    showProgress=FALSE)

IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::extractSwitchSummary(Treat.98.SwitchListAnalyzed, dIFcutoff = 0.1, filterForConsequences = TRUE)

IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::extractTopSwitches(
    Treat.98.SwitchListAnalyzed, 
    filterForConsequences = TRUE, 
    n = NA, 
    sortByQvals = TRUE)

switchPlot(Treat.98.SwitchListAnalyzed, gene = 'eml5')

```



### Male

#### Import Data
```{r,Treament Male 98 DTU Import Data}
# import data
Iso.Treat.98.Male.Quant <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::importIsoformExpression(
  parentDir = paste0(getwd(), "/Expression/"),
  pattern = "98M",
  readLength = 100,
  addIsofomIdAsColumn = TRUE)

# Make design matrix
Iso.Treat.98.Male.Design <- Sample.Info %>%
  # make sample column
  tibble::rownames_to_column(., var = "Sample") %>%
  # filter
  dplyr::filter(Sex == "M" & Timepoint == 98) %>%
  # select what we need
  dplyr::select(Sample, Treatment) %>%
  # rename
  dplyr::rename("sampleID" = Sample,
                "condition" = Treatment) %>%
  # fix sampleId
  dplyr::mutate(sampleID = gsub('\\.', '-', sampleID))
  
```

#### Formating
```{r,DTU Treatment 98 SwitchList}

# make swtichlist
Treat.98.Male.SwitchList <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::importRdata(
  isoformCountMatrix = Iso.Treat.98.Male.Quant$counts,
  isoformRepExpression = Iso.Treat.98.Male.Quant$abundance,
  designMatrix = Iso.Treat.98.Male.Design,
  isoformExonAnnoation = paste0(getwd(), "/Genome/no_genes_genomic.gtf"),
  isoformNtFasta = paste0(getwd(), "/Genome/rna.fa"),
  fixStringTieAnnotationProblem = TRUE,
    showProgress = FALSE)

# Filter Switch List
Treat.98.Male.SwitchListFiltered <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::preFilter(Treat.98.Male.SwitchList,
                                                                    geneExpressionCutoff = 5,
                                                                    isoformExpressionCutoff = 1,
                                                                    removeSingleIsoformGenes = TRUE)
```

#### Analysis
```{r,DTU Treatment 98 Analysis}
# analyize switch list
Treat.98.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::isoformSwitchTestDEXSeq(
  switchAnalyzeRlist = Treat.98.Male.SwitchListFiltered,
  reduceToSwitchingGenes=TRUE)

IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::extractSwitchSummary(Treat.98.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed)
```

#### Extract Sequences
```{r, Treatment 98 Extract Sequences}
Treat.98.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::extractSequence(
  Treat.98.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed,
  pathToOutput = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/98/Male"))
```

#### Add External Predictions
```{r, Treatment 98 Add Predictions}
# cpc2
Treat.98.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeCPC2(
  switchAnalyzeRlist   = Treat.98.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToCPC2resultFile  = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/98/Male/result_cpc2.txt"),
    codingCutoff         = 0.725, # the coding potential cutoff we suggested for human
    removeNoncodinORFs   = FALSE)

# PFAM not working right now
Treat.98.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzePFAM(
  switchAnalyzeRlist = Treat.48.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToPFAMresultFile = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/98/Male/result_pfam.txt"))

# Add SignalP analysis
Treat.48.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeSignalP(
    switchAnalyzeRlist       = Treat.48.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToSignalPresultFile  = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/48/Male/prediction_results.txt"))

# Add DeepLoc2 analysis
Treat.98.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeDeepLoc2(
    switchAnalyzeRlist = Treat.98.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToDeepLoc2resultFile = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/98/Male/DeepLoc2.csv"),
    quiet = FALSE)

# Add DeepTMHMM analysis
Treat.98.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeDeepTMHMM(
    switchAnalyzeRlist   = Treat.98.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToDeepTMHMMresultFile =  paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/98/Male/TMRs.gff3"),
    showProgress=FALSE)


### Add NetsurfP-2 analysis
Treat.98.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeNetSurfP2(
    switchAnalyzeRlist        = Treat.98.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToNetSurfP2resultFile = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/98/Male/NetSurfP2.csv"),
    showProgress = FALSE)
```

```{r, 98 Alternative Splicing}
# alternative splicing
Treat.98.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeAlternativeSplicing(
    switchAnalyzeRlist = Treat.98.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    quiet=TRUE)

```

#### Consequences
```{r, 98 Consequences}
# consequences
consequencesOfInterest <- c('tss',
                            'tts',
                            'last_exon',
                            'isoform_seq_similarity',
                            'isoform_length',
                            'exon_number',
                            'intron_structure',
                            'intron_retention',
                            'isoform_class_code',
                            'coding_potential',
                            'ORF_seq_similarity',
                            'ORF_genomic',
                            'ORF_length',
                            '5_utr_seq_similarity',
                            '5_utr_length',
                            '3_utr_seq_similarity',
                            '3_utr_length',
                            'NMD_status',
                            'domains_identified',
                            'domain_isotype',
                            'domain_length',
                            'genomic_domain_position',
                            'IDR_identified',
                            'IDR_length',
                            'IDR_type',
                            'sub_cell_location',
                            'sub_cell_shift_to_cell_membrane',
                            'sub_cell_shift_to_cytoplasm',
                            'sub_cell_shift_to_nucleus',
                            'sub_cell_shift_to_Extracellular',
                            'isoform_topology',
                            'extracellular_region_count',
                            'intracellular_region_count',
                            'extracellular_region_length',
                            'intracellular_region_length')


Treat.98.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeSwitchConsequences(
    Treat.98.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    consequencesToAnalyze = consequencesOfInterest, 
    dIFcutoff = 0.1, 
    showProgress=FALSE)

IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::extractSwitchSummary(Treat.98.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed, dIFcutoff = 0.1, filterForConsequences = TRUE)

IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::extractTopSwitches(
    Treat.98.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed, 
    filterForConsequences = TRUE, 
    n = NA, 
    sortByQvals = TRUE)

switchPlot(Treat.98.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed, gene = 'eml5')

```

### Female

#### Import Data
```{r,Treament Female 98 DTU Import Data}
# import data
Iso.Treat.98.Female.Quant <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::importIsoformExpression(
  parentDir = paste0(getwd(), "/Expression/"),
  pattern = "98F",
  readLength = 100,
  addIsofomIdAsColumn = TRUE)

# Make design matrix
Iso.Treat.98.Female.Design <- Sample.Info %>%
  # make sample column
  tibble::rownames_to_column(., var = "Sample") %>%
  # filter
  dplyr::filter(Sex == "F" & Timepoint == 98) %>%
  # select what we need
  dplyr::select(Sample, Treatment) %>%
  # rename
  dplyr::rename("sampleID" = Sample,
                "condition" = Treatment) %>%
  # fix sampleId
  dplyr::mutate(sampleID = gsub('\\.', '-', sampleID))
  
```

#### Formating
```{r,DTU Treatment 98 Female SwitchList}

# make swtichlist
Treat.98.Female.SwitchList <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::importRdata(
  isoformCountMatrix = Iso.Treat.98.Female.Quant$counts,
  isoformRepExpression = Iso.Treat.98.Female.Quant$abundance,
  designMatrix = Iso.Treat.98.Female.Design,
  isoformExonAnnoation = paste0(getwd(), "/Genome/no_genes_genomic.gtf"),
  isoformNtFasta = paste0(getwd(), "/Genome/rna.fa"),
  fixStringTieAnnotationProblem = TRUE,
    showProgress = FALSE)

# Filter Switch List
Treat.98.Female.SwitchListFiltered <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::preFilter(Treat.98.Female.SwitchList,
                                                                    geneExpressionCutoff = 5,
                                                                    isoformExpressionCutoff = 1,
                                                                    removeSingleIsoformGenes = TRUE)
```

#### Analysis
```{r,DTU Treatment 98 Female Analysis}
# analyize switch list
Treat.98.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::isoformSwitchTestDEXSeq(
  switchAnalyzeRlist = Treat.48.Female.SwitchListFiltered,
  reduceToSwitchingGenes=TRUE)

IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::extractSwitchSummary(Treat.98.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed)
```


## Treament Effect at 144

### Sexes Combined

#### Import Data
```{r,Treatment 144 DTU Import Data}
# import data
Iso.Treat.144.Quant <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::importIsoformExpression(
  parentDir = paste0(getwd(), "/Expression/"),
  pattern = "144",
  readLength = 100,
  addIsofomIdAsColumn = TRUE)

# Make design matrix
Iso.Treat.144.Design <- Sample.Info %>%
  # make sample column
  tibble::rownames_to_column(., var = "Sample") %>%
  # filter
  dplyr::filter(Timepoint == "144") %>%
  # select what we need
  dplyr::select(Sample, Treatment, Sex) %>%
  # rename
  dplyr::rename("sampleID" = Sample,
                "condition" = Treatment) %>%
  # fix sampleId
  dplyr::mutate(sampleID = gsub('\\.', '-', sampleID)) 
```

#### Formating
```{r,DTU Treatment 144 SwitchList}

# make swtichlist
Treat.144.SwitchList <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::importRdata(
  isoformCountMatrix = Iso.Treat.144.Quant$counts,
  isoformRepExpression = Iso.Treat.144.Quant$abundance,
  designMatrix = Iso.Treat.144.Design,
  isoformExonAnnoation = paste0(getwd(), "/Genome/no_genes_genomic.gtf"),
  isoformNtFasta = paste0(getwd(), "/Genome/rna.fa"),
  fixStringTieAnnotationProblem = TRUE,
    showProgress = FALSE)

# Filter Switch List
Treat.144.SwitchListFiltered <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::preFilter(Treat.144.SwitchList,
                                                                    geneExpressionCutoff = 5,
                                                                    isoformExpressionCutoff = 1,
                                                                    removeSingleIsoformGenes = TRUE)
```

#### Analysis
```{r,DTU 144 Analysis}
# analyize switch list
Treat.144.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::isoformSwitchTestDEXSeq(
  switchAnalyzeRlist = Treat.144.SwitchListFiltered,
  reduceToSwitchingGenes=TRUE)

IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::extractSwitchSummary(Treat.144.SwitchListAnalyzed)

```


### Male

#### Import Data
```{r,Treament Male 144 DTU Import Data}
# import data
Iso.Treat.144.Male.Quant <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::importIsoformExpression(
  parentDir = paste0(getwd(), "/Expression/"),
  pattern = "144M",
  readLength = 100,
  addIsofomIdAsColumn = TRUE)

# Make design matrix
Iso.Treat.144.Male.Design <- Sample.Info %>%
  # make sample column
  tibble::rownames_to_column(., var = "Sample") %>%
  # filter
  dplyr::filter(Sex == "M" & Timepoint == 144) %>%
  # select what we need
  dplyr::select(Sample, Treatment) %>%
  # rename
  dplyr::rename("sampleID" = Sample,
                "condition" = Treatment) %>%
  # fix sampleId
  dplyr::mutate(sampleID = gsub('\\.', '-', sampleID))
  
```

#### Formating
```{r,DTU Treatment 144 SwitchList}

# make swtichlist
Treat.144.Male.SwitchList <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::importRdata(
  isoformCountMatrix = Iso.Treat.144.Male.Quant$counts,
  isoformRepExpression = Iso.Treat.144.Male.Quant$abundance,
  designMatrix = Iso.Treat.144.Male.Design,
  isoformExonAnnoation = paste0(getwd(), "/Genome/no_genes_genomic.gtf"),
  isoformNtFasta = paste0(getwd(), "/Genome/rna.fa"),
  fixStringTieAnnotationProblem = TRUE,
    showProgress = FALSE)

# Filter Switch List
Treat.144.Male.SwitchListFiltered <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::preFilter(Treat.144.Male.SwitchList,
                                                                    geneExpressionCutoff = 5,
                                                                    isoformExpressionCutoff = 1,
                                                                    removeSingleIsoformGenes = TRUE)
```

#### Analysis
```{r,DTU Treatment 144 Analysis}
# analyize switch list
Treat.144.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::isoformSwitchTestDEXSeq(
  switchAnalyzeRlist = Treat.144.Male.SwitchListFiltered,
  reduceToSwitchingGenes=TRUE)

IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::extractSwitchSummary(Treat.144.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed)
```

#### Extract Sequences
```{r, Treatment 144 Extract Sequences}
Treat.144.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::extractSequence(
  Treat.144.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed,
  pathToOutput = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/144/Male"))
```

#### Add External Predictions
```{r, Treatment 144 Add Predictions}
# cpc2
Treat.144.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeCPC2(
  switchAnalyzeRlist   = Treat.144.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToCPC2resultFile  = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/144/Male/result_cpc2.txt"),
    codingCutoff         = 0.725, # the coding potential cutoff we suggested for human
    removeNoncodinORFs   = FALSE)

# PFAM not working right now
Treat.144.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzePFAM(
  switchAnalyzeRlist = Treat.144.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToPFAMresultFile = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/144/Male/result_pfam.txt"))

# Add SignalP analysis
Treat.144.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeSignalP(
    switchAnalyzeRlist       = Treat.144.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToSignalPresultFile  = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/144/Male/prediction_results.txt"))

# Add DeepLoc2 analysis
Treat.144.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeDeepLoc2(
    switchAnalyzeRlist = Treat.144.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToDeepLoc2resultFile = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/144/Male/DeepLoc2.csv"),
    quiet = FALSE)

# Add DeepTMHMM analysis
Treat.144.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeDeepTMHMM(
    switchAnalyzeRlist   = Treat.144.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToDeepTMHMMresultFile =  paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/144/Male/TMRs.gff3"),
    showProgress=FALSE)


### Add NetsurfP-2 analysis
Treat.144.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeNetSurfP2(
    switchAnalyzeRlist        = Treat.144.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToNetSurfP2resultFile = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/144/Male/NetSurfP2.csv"),
    showProgress = FALSE)
```

```{r, 144 Alternative Splicing}
# alternative splicing
Treat.144.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeAlternativeSplicing(
    switchAnalyzeRlist = Treat.144.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    quiet=TRUE)

```

#### Consequences
```{r, 144 Consequences}
# consequences
consequencesOfInterest <- c('tss',
                            'tts',
                            'last_exon',
                            'isoform_seq_similarity',
                            'isoform_length',
                            'exon_number',
                            'intron_structure',
                            'intron_retention',
                            'isoform_class_code',
                            'coding_potential',
                            'ORF_seq_similarity',
                            'ORF_genomic',
                            'ORF_length',
                            '5_utr_seq_similarity',
                            '5_utr_length',
                            '3_utr_seq_similarity',
                            '3_utr_length',
                            'NMD_status',
                            'domains_identified',
                            'domain_isotype',
                            'domain_length',
                            'genomic_domain_position',
                            'IDR_identified',
                            'IDR_length',
                            'IDR_type',
                            'sub_cell_location',
                            'sub_cell_shift_to_cell_membrane',
                            'sub_cell_shift_to_cytoplasm',
                            'sub_cell_shift_to_nucleus',
                            'sub_cell_shift_to_Extracellular',
                            'isoform_topology',
                            'extracellular_region_count',
                            'intracellular_region_count',
                            'extracellular_region_length',
                            'intracellular_region_length')


Treat.144.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeSwitchConsequences(
    Treat.144.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    consequencesToAnalyze = consequencesOfInterest, 
    dIFcutoff = 0.1, 
    showProgress=FALSE)

IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::extractSwitchSummary(Treat.144.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed, dIFcutoff = 0.1, filterForConsequences = TRUE)

IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::extractTopSwitches(
    Treat.144.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed, 
    filterForConsequences = TRUE, 
    n = NA, 
    sortByQvals = TRUE)

switchPlot(Treat.144.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed, gene = 'eml5')

```

### Female

#### Import Data
```{r,Treament Female 144 DTU Import Data}
# import data
Iso.Treat.144.Female.Quant <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::importIsoformExpression(
  parentDir = paste0(getwd(), "/Expression/"),
  pattern = "144F",
  readLength = 100,
  addIsofomIdAsColumn = TRUE)

# Make design matrix
Iso.Treat.144.Female.Design <- Sample.Info %>%
  # make sample column
  tibble::rownames_to_column(., var = "Sample") %>%
  # filter
  dplyr::filter(Sex == "F" & Timepoint == 144) %>%
  # select what we need
  dplyr::select(Sample, Treatment) %>%
  # rename
  dplyr::rename("sampleID" = Sample,
                "condition" = Treatment) %>%
  # fix sampleId
  dplyr::mutate(sampleID = gsub('\\.', '-', sampleID))
  
```

#### Formating
```{r,DTU Treatment 144 Female SwitchList}

# make swtichlist
Treat.144.Female.SwitchList <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::importRdata(
  isoformCountMatrix = Iso.Treat.144.Female.Quant$counts,
  isoformRepExpression = Iso.Treat.144.Female.Quant$abundance,
  designMatrix = Iso.Treat.144.Female.Design,
  isoformExonAnnoation = paste0(getwd(), "/Genome/no_genes_genomic.gtf"),
  isoformNtFasta = paste0(getwd(), "/Genome/rna.fa"),
  fixStringTieAnnotationProblem = TRUE,
    showProgress = FALSE)

# Filter Switch List
Treat.144.Female.SwitchListFiltered <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::preFilter(Treat.144.Female.SwitchList,
                                                                    geneExpressionCutoff = 5,
                                                                    isoformExpressionCutoff = 1,
                                                                    removeSingleIsoformGenes = TRUE)
```

#### Analysis
```{r,DTU Treatment 144 Female Analysis}
# analyize switch list
Treat.144.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::isoformSwitchTestDEXSeq(
  switchAnalyzeRlist = Treat.144.Female.SwitchListFiltered,
  reduceToSwitchingGenes=TRUE)

IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::extractSwitchSummary(Treat.144.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed)
```


#### Extract Sequences
```{r, Treatment 144 Extract Sequences}
Treat.144.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::extractSequence(
  Treat.144.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed,
  pathToOutput = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/144/Female/"))
```

#### Add External Predictions
```{r, Treatment 144 Add Predictions}
# cpc2
Treat.144.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeCPC2(
  switchAnalyzeRlist   = Treat.144.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToCPC2resultFile  = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/144/Female/result_cpc2.txt"),
    codingCutoff         = 0.725, # the coding potential cutoff we suggested for human
    removeNoncodinORFs   = FALSE)

# PFAM not working right now
Treat.144.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzePFAM(
  switchAnalyzeRlist = Treat.144.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToPFAMresultFile = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/144/Female/result_pfam.txt"))

# Add SignalP analysis
Treat.144.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeSignalP(
    switchAnalyzeRlist       = Treat.144.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToSignalPresultFile  = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/144/Female/prediction_results.txt"))

# Add DeepLoc2 analysis
Treat.144.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeDeepLoc2(
    switchAnalyzeRlist = Treat.144.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToDeepLoc2resultFile = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/144/Female/DeepLoc2.csv"),
    quiet = FALSE)

# Add DeepTMHMM analysis
Treat.144.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeDeepTMHMM(
    switchAnalyzeRlist   = Treat.144.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToDeepTMHMMresultFile =  paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/144/Female/TMRs.gff3"),
    showProgress=FALSE)


### Add NetsurfP-2 analysis
Treat.144.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeNetSurfP2(
    switchAnalyzeRlist        = Treat.144.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToNetSurfP2resultFile = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/144/Female/NetSurfP2.csv"),
    showProgress = FALSE)
```

```{r, 144 Alternative Splicing}
# alternative splicing
Treat.144.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeAlternativeSplicing(
    switchAnalyzeRlist = Treat.144.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    quiet=TRUE)

```

#### Consequences
```{r, 144 Consequences}
# consequences
consequencesOfInterest <- c('tss',
                            'tts',
                            'last_exon',
                            'isoform_seq_similarity',
                            'isoform_length',
                            'exon_number',
                            'intron_structure',
                            'intron_retention',
                            'isoform_class_code',
                            'coding_potential',
                            'ORF_seq_similarity',
                            'ORF_genomic',
                            'ORF_length',
                            '5_utr_seq_similarity',
                            '5_utr_length',
                            '3_utr_seq_similarity',
                            '3_utr_length',
                            'NMD_status',
                            'domains_identified',
                            'domain_isotype',
                            'domain_length',
                            'genomic_domain_position',
                            'IDR_identified',
                            'IDR_length',
                            'IDR_type',
                            'sub_cell_location',
                            'sub_cell_shift_to_cell_membrane',
                            'sub_cell_shift_to_cytoplasm',
                            'sub_cell_shift_to_nucleus',
                            'sub_cell_shift_to_Extracellular',
                            'isoform_topology',
                            'extracellular_region_count',
                            'intracellular_region_count',
                            'extracellular_region_length',
                            'intracellular_region_length')


Treat.144.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeSwitchConsequences(
    Treat.144.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    consequencesToAnalyze = consequencesOfInterest, 
    dIFcutoff = 0.1, 
    showProgress=FALSE)

IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::extractSwitchSummary(Treat.144.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed, dIFcutoff = 0.1, filterForConsequences = TRUE)

IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::extractTopSwitches(
    Treat.144.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed, 
    filterForConsequences = TRUE, 
    n = NA, 
    sortByQvals = TRUE)

switchPlot(Treat.144.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed, gene = 'eml5')

```

## Treament Effect at 240

### Sexes Combined

#### Import Data
```{r,Treatment 240 DTU Import Data}
# import data
Iso.Treat.240.Quant <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::importIsoformExpression(
  parentDir = paste0(getwd(), "/Expression/"),
  pattern = "240",
  readLength = 100,
  addIsofomIdAsColumn = TRUE)

# Make design matrix
Iso.Treat.240.Design <- Sample.Info %>%
  # make sample column
  tibble::rownames_to_column(., var = "Sample") %>%
  # filter
  dplyr::filter(Timepoint == "240") %>%
  # select what we need
  dplyr::select(Sample, Treatment, Sex) %>%
  # rename
  dplyr::rename("sampleID" = Sample,
                "condition" = Treatment) %>%
  # fix sampleId
  dplyr::mutate(sampleID = gsub('\\.', '-', sampleID)) 
```

#### Formating
```{r,DTU Treatment 240 SwitchList}

# make swtichlist
Treat.240.SwitchList <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::importRdata(
  isoformCountMatrix = Iso.Treat.240.Quant$counts,
  isoformRepExpression = Iso.Treat.240.Quant$abundance,
  designMatrix = Iso.Treat.240.Design,
  isoformExonAnnoation = paste0(getwd(), "/Genome/no_genes_genomic.gtf"),
  isoformNtFasta = paste0(getwd(), "/Genome/rna.fa"),
  fixStringTieAnnotationProblem = TRUE,
    showProgress = FALSE)

# Filter Switch List
Treat.240.SwitchListFiltered <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::preFilter(Treat.240.SwitchList,
                                                                    geneExpressionCutoff = 5,
                                                                    isoformExpressionCutoff = 1,
                                                                    removeSingleIsoformGenes = TRUE)
```

#### Analysis
```{r,DTU 240 Global Analysis}
# analyize switch list
Treat.240.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::isoformSwitchTestDEXSeq(
  switchAnalyzeRlist = Treat.240.SwitchListFiltered,
  reduceToSwitchingGenes=TRUE)

IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::extractSwitchSummary(Treat.240.SwitchListAnalyzed)

```

#### Extract Sequences
```{r, Treatment 240 Extract Sequences}
Treat.240.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::extractSequence(
  Treat.240.SwitchListAnalyzed,
  pathToOutput = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/240/Sexes_Combined/"))
```

#### Add External Predictions
```{r, Treatment 144 Add Predictions}
# cpc2
Treat.240.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeCPC2(
  switchAnalyzeRlist   = Treat.240.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToCPC2resultFile  = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/240/Sexes_Combined/result_cpc2.txt"),
    codingCutoff         = 0.725, # the coding potential cutoff we suggested for human
    removeNoncodinORFs   = FALSE)

# PFAM not working right now
Treat.240.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzePFAM(
  switchAnalyzeRlist = Treat.240.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToPFAMresultFile = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/240/Sexes_Combined/result_pfam.txt"))

# Add SignalP analysis
Treat.240.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeSignalP(
    switchAnalyzeRlist       = Treat.240.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToSignalPresultFile  = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/240/Sexes_Combined/prediction_results.txt"))

# Add DeepLoc2 analysis
Treat.240.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeDeepLoc2(
    switchAnalyzeRlist = Treat.240.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToDeepLoc2resultFile = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/240/Sexes_Combined/DeepLoc2.csv"),
    quiet = FALSE)

# Add DeepTMHMM analysis
Treat.240.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeDeepTMHMM(
    switchAnalyzeRlist   = Treat.240.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToDeepTMHMMresultFile =  paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/240/Sexes_Combined/TMRs.gff3"),
    showProgress=FALSE)

### Add NetsurfP-2 analysis
Treat.240.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeNetSurfP2(
    switchAnalyzeRlist        = Treat.240.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToNetSurfP2resultFile = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/240/Sexes_Combined/NetSurfP2.csv"),
    showProgress = FALSE)
```

```{r, 240 Alternative Splicing}
# alternative splicing
Treat.240.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeAlternativeSplicing(
    switchAnalyzeRlist = Treat.240.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    quiet=TRUE)

```

#### Consequences
```{r, 240 Consequences}
# consequences
consequencesOfInterest <- c('tss',
                            'tts',
                            'last_exon',
                            'isoform_seq_similarity',
                            'isoform_length',
                            'exon_number',
                            'intron_structure',
                            'intron_retention',
                            'isoform_class_code',
                            'coding_potential',
                            'ORF_seq_similarity',
                            'ORF_genomic',
                            'ORF_length',
                            '5_utr_seq_similarity',
                            '5_utr_length',
                            '3_utr_seq_similarity',
                            '3_utr_length',
                            'NMD_status',
                            'domains_identified',
                            'domain_isotype',
                            'domain_length',
                            'genomic_domain_position',
                            'IDR_identified',
                            'IDR_length',
                            'IDR_type',
                            'sub_cell_location',
                            'sub_cell_shift_to_cell_membrane',
                            'sub_cell_shift_to_cytoplasm',
                            'sub_cell_shift_to_nucleus',
                            'sub_cell_shift_to_Extracellular',
                            'isoform_topology',
                            'extracellular_region_count',
                            'intracellular_region_count',
                            'extracellular_region_length',
                            'intracellular_region_length')


Treat.240.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeSwitchConsequences(
    Treat.240.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    consequencesToAnalyze = consequencesOfInterest, 
    dIFcutoff = 0.1, 
    showProgress=FALSE)

IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::extractSwitchSummary(Treat.240.SwitchListAnalyzed, dIFcutoff = 0.1, filterForConsequences = TRUE)

IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::extractTopSwitches(
    Treat.240.SwitchListAnalyzed, 
    filterForConsequences = TRUE, 
    n = NA, 
    sortByQvals = TRUE)

switchPlot(Treat.240.SwitchListAnalyzed, gene = 'eml5')

```



### Male

#### Import Data
```{r,Treament Male 144 DTU Import Data}
# import data
Iso.Treat.240.Male.Quant <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::importIsoformExpression(
  parentDir = paste0(getwd(), "/Expression/"),
  pattern = "240M",
  readLength = 100,
  addIsofomIdAsColumn = TRUE)

# Make design matrix
Iso.Treat.240.Male.Design <- Sample.Info %>%
  # make sample column
  tibble::rownames_to_column(., var = "Sample") %>%
  # filter
  dplyr::filter(Sex == "M" & Timepoint == 240) %>%
  # select what we need
  dplyr::select(Sample, Treatment) %>%
  # rename
  dplyr::rename("sampleID" = Sample,
                "condition" = Treatment) %>%
  # fix sampleId
  dplyr::mutate(sampleID = gsub('\\.', '-', sampleID))
  
```

#### Formating
```{r,DTU Treatment 240 SwitchList}

# make swtichlist
Treat.240.Male.SwitchList <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::importRdata(
  isoformCountMatrix = Iso.Treat.240.Male.Quant$counts,
  isoformRepExpression = Iso.Treat.240.Male.Quant$abundance,
  designMatrix = Iso.Treat.240.Male.Design,
  isoformExonAnnoation = paste0(getwd(), "/Genome/no_genes_genomic.gtf"),
  isoformNtFasta = paste0(getwd(), "/Genome/rna.fa"),
  fixStringTieAnnotationProblem = TRUE,
    showProgress = FALSE)

# Filter Switch List
Treat.240.Male.SwitchListFiltered <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::preFilter(Treat.240.Male.SwitchList,
                                                                    geneExpressionCutoff = 5,
                                                                    isoformExpressionCutoff = 1,
                                                                    removeSingleIsoformGenes = TRUE)
```

#### Analysis
```{r,DTU Treatment 240 Analysis}
# analyize switch list
Treat.240.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::isoformSwitchTestDEXSeq(
  switchAnalyzeRlist = Treat.240.Male.SwitchListFiltered,
  reduceToSwitchingGenes=TRUE)

IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::extractSwitchSummary(Treat.240.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed)
```

#### Extract Sequences
```{r, Treatment 240 Extract Sequences}
Treat.240.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::extractSequence(
  Treat.240.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed,
  pathToOutput = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/240/Male"))
```

#### Add External Predictions
```{r, Treatment 240 Add Predictions}
# cpc2
Treat.240.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeCPC2(
  switchAnalyzeRlist   = Treat.240.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToCPC2resultFile  = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/240/Male/result_cpc2.txt"),
    codingCutoff         = 0.725, # the coding potential cutoff we suggested for human
    removeNoncodinORFs   = FALSE)

# PFAM not working right now
Treat.240.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzePFAM(
  switchAnalyzeRlist = Treat.240.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToPFAMresultFile = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/240/Male/result_pfam.txt"))

# Add SignalP analysis
Treat.240.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeSignalP(
    switchAnalyzeRlist       = Treat.240.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToSignalPresultFile  = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/240/Male/prediction_results.txt"))

# Add DeepLoc2 analysis
Treat.240.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeDeepLoc2(
    switchAnalyzeRlist = Treat.240.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToDeepLoc2resultFile = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/240/Male/DeepLoc2.csv"),
    quiet = FALSE)

# Add DeepTMHMM analysis
Treat.240.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeDeepTMHMM(
    switchAnalyzeRlist   = Treat.240.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToDeepTMHMMresultFile =  paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/240/Male/TMRs.gff3"),
    showProgress=FALSE)


### Add NetsurfP-2 analysis
Treat.240.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeNetSurfP2(
    switchAnalyzeRlist        = Treat.240.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToNetSurfP2resultFile = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/240/Male/NetSurfP2.csv"),
    showProgress = FALSE)
```

```{r, 98 Alternative Splicing}
# alternative splicing
Treat.240.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeAlternativeSplicing(
    switchAnalyzeRlist = Treat.240.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    quiet=TRUE)

```

#### Consequences
```{r, 98 Consequences}
# consequences
consequencesOfInterest <- c('tss',
                            'tts',
                            'last_exon',
                            'isoform_seq_similarity',
                            'isoform_length',
                            'exon_number',
                            'intron_structure',
                            'intron_retention',
                            'isoform_class_code',
                            'coding_potential',
                            'ORF_seq_similarity',
                            'ORF_genomic',
                            'ORF_length',
                            '5_utr_seq_similarity',
                            '5_utr_length',
                            '3_utr_seq_similarity',
                            '3_utr_length',
                            'NMD_status',
                            'domains_identified',
                            'domain_isotype',
                            'domain_length',
                            'genomic_domain_position',
                            'IDR_identified',
                            'IDR_length',
                            'IDR_type',
                            'sub_cell_location',
                            'sub_cell_shift_to_cell_membrane',
                            'sub_cell_shift_to_cytoplasm',
                            'sub_cell_shift_to_nucleus',
                            'sub_cell_shift_to_Extracellular',
                            'isoform_topology',
                            'extracellular_region_count',
                            'intracellular_region_count',
                            'extracellular_region_length',
                            'intracellular_region_length')


Treat.240.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeSwitchConsequences(
    Treat.240.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    consequencesToAnalyze = consequencesOfInterest, 
    dIFcutoff = 0.1, 
    showProgress=FALSE)

IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::extractSwitchSummary(Treat.240.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed, dIFcutoff = 0.1, filterForConsequences = TRUE)

IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::extractTopSwitches(
    Treat.240.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed, 
    filterForConsequences = TRUE, 
    n = NA, 
    sortByQvals = TRUE)

switchPlot(Treat.144.Male.SwitchListAnalyzed, gene = 'eml5')

```

### Female

#### Import Data
```{r,Treament Female 240 DTU Import Data}
# import data
Iso.Treat.240.Female.Quant <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::importIsoformExpression(
  parentDir = paste0(getwd(), "/Expression/"),
  pattern = "240F",
  readLength = 100,
  addIsofomIdAsColumn = TRUE)

# Make design matrix
Iso.Treat.240.Female.Design <- Sample.Info %>%
  # make sample column
  tibble::rownames_to_column(., var = "Sample") %>%
  # filter
  dplyr::filter(Sex == "F" & Timepoint == 240) %>%
  # select what we need
  dplyr::select(Sample, Treatment) %>%
  # rename
  dplyr::rename("sampleID" = Sample,
                "condition" = Treatment) %>%
  # fix sampleId
  dplyr::mutate(sampleID = gsub('\\.', '-', sampleID))
  
```

#### Formating
```{r,DTU Treatment 98 Female SwitchList}

# make swtichlist
Treat.240.Female.SwitchList <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::importRdata(
  isoformCountMatrix = Iso.Treat.240.Female.Quant$counts,
  isoformRepExpression = Iso.Treat.240.Female.Quant$abundance,
  designMatrix = Iso.Treat.240.Female.Design,
  isoformExonAnnoation = paste0(getwd(), "/Genome/no_genes_genomic.gtf"),
  isoformNtFasta = paste0(getwd(), "/Genome/rna.fa"),
  fixStringTieAnnotationProblem = TRUE,
    showProgress = FALSE)

# Filter Switch List
Treat.240.Female.SwitchListFiltered <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::preFilter(Treat.240.Female.SwitchList,
                                                                    geneExpressionCutoff = 5,
                                                                    isoformExpressionCutoff = 1,
                                                                    removeSingleIsoformGenes = TRUE)
```

#### Analysis
```{r,DTU Treatment 144 Female Analysis}
# analyize switch list
Treat.240.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::isoformSwitchTestDEXSeq(
  switchAnalyzeRlist = Treat.240.Female.SwitchListFiltered,
  reduceToSwitchingGenes=TRUE)

IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::extractSwitchSummary(Treat.240.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed)
```


#### Extract Sequences
```{r, Treatment 144 Extract Sequences}
Treat.240.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::extractSequence(
  Treat.240.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed,
  pathToOutput = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/240/Female/"))
```

#### Add External Predictions
```{r, Treatment 144 Add Predictions}
# cpc2
Treat.240.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeCPC2(
  switchAnalyzeRlist   = Treat.240.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToCPC2resultFile  = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/240/Female/result_cpc2.txt"),
    codingCutoff         = 0.725, # the coding potential cutoff we suggested for human
    removeNoncodinORFs   = FALSE)

# PFAM not working right now
Treat.240.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzePFAM(
  switchAnalyzeRlist = Treat.240.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToPFAMresultFile = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/240/Female/result_pfam.txt"))

# Add SignalP analysis
Treat.240.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeSignalP(
    switchAnalyzeRlist       = Treat.240.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToSignalPresultFile  = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/240/Female/prediction_results.txt"))

# Add DeepLoc2 analysis
Treat.240.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeDeepLoc2(
    switchAnalyzeRlist = Treat.240.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToDeepLoc2resultFile = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/240/Female/DeepLoc2.csv"),
    quiet = FALSE)

# Add DeepTMHMM analysis
Treat.240.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeDeepTMHMM(
    switchAnalyzeRlist   = Treat.240.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToDeepTMHMMresultFile =  paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/240/Female/TMRs.gff3"),
    showProgress=FALSE)


### Add NetsurfP-2 analysis
Treat.240.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeNetSurfP2(
    switchAnalyzeRlist        = Treat.240.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    pathToNetSurfP2resultFile = paste0(getwd(), "/Results/Extracted/240/Female/NetSurfP2.csv"),
    showProgress = FALSE)
```

```{r, 144 Alternative Splicing}
# alternative splicing
Treat.240.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeAlternativeSplicing(
    switchAnalyzeRlist = Treat.240.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    quiet=TRUE)

```

#### Consequences
```{r, 144 Consequences}
# consequences
consequencesOfInterest <- c('tss',
                            'tts',
                            'last_exon',
                            'isoform_seq_similarity',
                            'isoform_length',
                            'exon_number',
                            'intron_structure',
                            'intron_retention',
                            'isoform_class_code',
                            'coding_potential',
                            'ORF_seq_similarity',
                            'ORF_genomic',
                            'ORF_length',
                            '5_utr_seq_similarity',
                            '5_utr_length',
                            '3_utr_seq_similarity',
                            '3_utr_length',
                            'NMD_status',
                            'domains_identified',
                            'domain_isotype',
                            'domain_length',
                            'genomic_domain_position',
                            'IDR_identified',
                            'IDR_length',
                            'IDR_type',
                            'sub_cell_location',
                            'sub_cell_shift_to_cell_membrane',
                            'sub_cell_shift_to_cytoplasm',
                            'sub_cell_shift_to_nucleus',
                            'sub_cell_shift_to_Extracellular',
                            'isoform_topology',
                            'extracellular_region_count',
                            'intracellular_region_count',
                            'extracellular_region_length',
                            'intracellular_region_length')


Treat.240.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed <- IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::analyzeSwitchConsequences(
    Treat.240.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed,
    consequencesToAnalyze = consequencesOfInterest, 
    dIFcutoff = 0.1, 
    showProgress=FALSE)

IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::extractSwitchSummary(Treat.240.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed, dIFcutoff = 0.1, filterForConsequences = TRUE)

IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR::extractTopSwitches(
    Treat.240.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed, 
    filterForConsequences = TRUE, 
    n = NA, 
    sortByQvals = TRUE)

switchPlot(Treat.240.Female.SwitchListAnalyzed, gene = 'eml5')

```

# Make Results RData File

```{r, saving results}
# list of data object we need
# DGE.Voom.Results
# DGE.Voom.Results.Info.Table
# DGE GO terms
#Global WGCNA
  # table of significicant modules
  # Table of all the genes in each module
  # GO.Modules.Table
# Time specific
  # table of significicant modules
  # Table of all the genes in each module
  # Module.GO.Timepoints.Table

```

# Plots

## Venn diagrams

### DGE

#### DGE-Genes

##### Comparision between timepoints

```{r, Venn Diagram for iso}

VD.hellman <-ggVennDiagram::ggVennDiagram(x = list("Overall" = 
                                                     (Treat.Global.SwitchListAnalyzed$isoformFeatures %>%
                                                        dplyr::select(gene_id) %>%
                                                        distinct(.)),
                                                   "Timepoint 48" = 
                                                     (Treat.48.SwitchListAnalyzed$isoformFeatures %>%
                                                        dplyr::select(gene_id) %>%
                                                        distinct(.)),
                                                   "Timepoint 144" = 
                                                   (Treat.144.SwitchListAnalyzed$isoformFeatures %>%
                                                        dplyr::select(gene_id) %>%
                                                        distinct(.)))) + 
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Paired") + 
  labs(title = "Control vs. Predator Paternal Treatment") + 
  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = .2))

```{r, Venn Diagram for 98 vs 48}

VD.98.48 <-ggVennDiagram::ggVennDiagram(x = list("Control Male" = (DGE.Voom.Results %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupM.Control.98 - GroupM.Control.48"))$Gene_Id,
                                                 "Control Female" = (DGE.Voom.Results %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupF.Control.98 - GroupF.Control.48"))$Gene_Id,
                                                 "Predator Male" = (DGE.Voom.Results %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupM.Predator.98 - GroupM.Predator.48"))$Gene_Id,
                                                 "Predator Female" = (DGE.Voom.Results %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupF.Predator.98 - GroupF.Predator.48"))$Gene_Id)) + 
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Paired") + 
  labs(title = "Timepoint 98 vs 48") + 
  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = .2))
```

```{r, Venn Diagram for 144 vs 98}

VD.144.98 <-ggVennDiagram::ggVennDiagram(x = list("Control Male" = (DGE.Voom.Results %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupM.Control.144 - GroupM.Control.98"))$Gene_Id,
                                                 "Control Female" = (DGE.Voom.Results %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupF.Control.144 - GroupF.Control.98"))$Gene_Id,
                                                 "Predator Male" = (DGE.Voom.Results %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupM.Predator.144 - GroupM.Predator.98"))$Gene_Id,
                                                 "Predator Female" = (DGE.Voom.Results %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupF.Predator.144 - GroupF.Predator.98"))$Gene_Id)) + 
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Paired") + 
  labs(title = "Timepoint 144 vs 98")+ 
  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = .2))
```

```{r, Venn Diagram for 240 vs 144}

VD.240.144 <-ggVennDiagram::ggVennDiagram(x = list("Control Male" = (DGE.Voom.Results %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupM.Control.240 - GroupM.Control.144"))$Gene_Id,
                                                 "Control Female" = (DGE.Voom.Results %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupF.Control.240 - GroupF.Control.144"))$Gene_Id,
                                                 "Predator Male" = (DGE.Voom.Results %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupM.Predator.240 - GroupM.Predator.144"))$Gene_Id,
                                                 "Predator Female" = (DGE.Voom.Results %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupF.Predator.240 - GroupF.Predator.144"))$Gene_Id)) + 
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Paired") + 
  labs(title = "Timepoint 240 vs 144")+ 
  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = .2))
```

##### Per Timepoint

```{r, Venn Diagram for 48}

VD.48 <-ggVennDiagram::ggVennDiagram(x = list("Male: Predator vs Control" = (DGE.Voom.Results %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupM.Predator.48 - GroupM.Control.48"))$Gene_Id,
                                                 "Female: Predator vs Control" = (DGE.Voom.Results %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupF.Predator.48 - GroupF.Control.48"))$Gene_Id,
                                                 "Predator: Male vs Female" = (DGE.Voom.Results %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupM.Predator.48 - GroupF.Predator.48"))$Gene_Id,
                                                 "Control: Male vs Female" = (DGE.Voom.Results %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupM.Control.48 - GroupF.Control.48"))$Gene_Id)) + 
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Paired") + 
  labs(title = "Timepoint 48")+ 
  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = .2))
```

```{r, Venn Diagram for 98}

VD.98 <-ggVennDiagram::ggVennDiagram(x = list("Male: Predator vs Control" = (DGE.Voom.Results %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupM.Predator.98 - GroupM.Control.98"))$Gene_Id,
                                                 "Female: Predator vs Control" = (DGE.Voom.Results %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupF.Predator.98 - GroupF.Control.98"))$Gene_Id,
                                                 "Predator: Male vs Female" = (DGE.Voom.Results %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupM.Predator.98 - GroupF.Predator.98"))$Gene_Id,
                                                 "Control: Male vs Female" = (DGE.Voom.Results %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupM.Control.98 - GroupF.Control.98"))$Gene_Id)) + 
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Paired") + 
  labs(title = "Timepoint 98")+ 
  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = .2))
```

```{r, Venn Diagram for 144}

VD.144 <-ggVennDiagram::ggVennDiagram(x = list("Male: Predator vs Control" = (DGE.Voom.Results %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupM.Predator.144 - GroupM.Control.144"))$Gene_Id,
                                                 "Female: Predator vs Control" = (DGE.Voom.Results %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupF.Predator.144 - GroupF.Control.144"))$Gene_Id,
                                                 "Predator: Male vs Female" = (DGE.Voom.Results %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupM.Predator.144 - GroupF.Predator.144"))$Gene_Id,
                                                 "Control: Male vs Female" = (DGE.Voom.Results %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupM.Control.144 - GroupF.Control.144"))$Gene_Id)) + 
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Paired") + 
  labs(title = "Timepoint 144")+ 
  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = .2))
```

```{r, Venn Diagram for 240}

VD.240 <-ggVennDiagram::ggVennDiagram(x = list("Male: Predator vs Control" = (DGE.Voom.Results %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupM.Predator.240 - GroupM.Control.240"))$Gene_Id,
                                                 "Female: Predator vs Control" = (DGE.Voom.Results %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupF.Predator.240 - GroupF.Control.240"))$Gene_Id,
                                                 "Predator: Male vs Female" = (DGE.Voom.Results %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupM.Predator.240 - GroupF.Predator.240"))$Gene_Id,
                                                 "Control: Male vs Female" = (DGE.Voom.Results %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupM.Control.240 - GroupF.Control.240"))$Gene_Id)) + 
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Paired") + 
  labs(title = "Timepoint 240")+ 
  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = .2))
```


##### Sex Differences Overall

```{r, Venn Diagram for 48}

VD.Sex <-ggVennDiagram::ggVennDiagram(x = list("Timepoint 48" = (DGE.Voom.Results %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "(GroupM.Predator.48 + GroupM.Control.48 - GroupF.Predator.48 - GroupF.Control.48)/4"))$Gene_Id,
                                                 "Timepoint 98" = (DGE.Voom.Results %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "(GroupM.Predator.98 + GroupM.Control.98 - GroupF.Predator.98 - GroupF.Control.88)/4"))$Gene_Id,
                                                 "Timepoint 144" = (DGE.Voom.Results %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "(GroupM.Predator.144 + GroupM.Control.144 - GroupF.Predator.144 - GroupF.Control.144)/4"))$Gene_Id,
                                                 "Timepoint 240" = (DGE.Voom.Results %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "(GroupM.Predator.240 + GroupM.Control.240 - GroupF.Predator.240 - GroupF.Control.240)/4"))$Gene_Id)) + 
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Paired") + 
  labs(title = "Male vs Female")+ 
  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = .2))
```

#### DGE - GO

##### Timepoints

```{r, Venn Diagram GO 98 vs 48}

VD.DGE.GO.98.48 <-ggVennDiagram::ggVennDiagram(x = list("Control Male" = (DGE.GO.Terms.All %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupM.Control.98 - GroupM.Control.48"))$term_id,
                                                 "Control Female" = (DGE.GO.Terms.All %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupF.Control.98 - GroupF.Control.48"))$term_id,
                                                 "Predator Male" = (DGE.GO.Terms.All %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupM.Predator.98 - GroupM.Predator.48"))$term_id,
                                                 "Predator Female" = (DGE.GO.Terms.All %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupF.Predator.98 - GroupF.Predator.48"))$term_id)) + 
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Paired") + 
  labs(title = "Timepoint 98 vs 48") + 
  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = .2))
```

```{r, Venn Diagram GO 98 vs 48}

VD.DGE.GO.144.98 <-ggVennDiagram::ggVennDiagram(x = list("Control Male" = (DGE.GO.Terms.All %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupM.Control.144 - GroupM.Control.98"))$term_id,
                                                 "Control Female" = (DGE.GO.Terms.All %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupF.Control.144 - GroupF.Control.98"))$term_id,
                                                 "Predator Male" = (DGE.GO.Terms.All %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupM.Predator.144 - GroupM.Predator.98"))$term_id,
                                                 "Predator Female" = (DGE.GO.Terms.All %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupF.Predator.144 - GroupF.Predator.98"))$term_id)) + 
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Paired") + 
  labs(title = "Timepoint 144 vs 98") + 
  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = .2))
```

```{r, Venn Diagram GO 98 vs 48}

VD.DGE.GO.240.144 <-ggVennDiagram::ggVennDiagram(x = list("Control Male" = (DGE.GO.Terms.All %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupM.Control.240 - GroupM.Control.144"))$term_id,
                                                 "Control Female" = (DGE.GO.Terms.All %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupF.Control.240 - GroupF.Control.144"))$term_id,
                                                 "Predator Male" = (DGE.GO.Terms.All %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupM.Predator.240 - GroupM.Predator.144"))$term_id,
                                                 "Predator Female" = (DGE.GO.Terms.All %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupF.Predator.240 - GroupF.Predator.144"))$term_id)) + 
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Paired") + 
  labs(title = "Timepoint 240 vs 144") + 
  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = .2))
```

##### Per Timepoint

```{r, Venn Diagram for 48}

VD.DGE.GO.48 <-ggVennDiagram::ggVennDiagram(x = list("Male: Predator vs Control" = (DGE.GO.Terms.All %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupM.Predator.48 - GroupM.Control.48"))$term_id,
                                                 "Female: Predator vs Control" = (DGE.GO.Terms.All %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupF.Predator.48 - GroupF.Control.48"))$term_id,
                                                 "Predator: Male vs Female" = (DGE.GO.Terms.All %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupM.Predator.48 - GroupF.Predator.48"))$term_id,
                                                 "Control: Male vs Female" = (DGE.GO.Terms.All %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupM.Control.48 - GroupF.Control.48"))$term_id)) + 
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Paired") + 
  labs(title = "Timepoint 48")+ 
  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = .2))
```

```{r, Venn Diagram for 98}

VD.DGE.GO.98 <-ggVennDiagram::ggVennDiagram(x = list("Male: Predator vs Control" = (DGE.GO.Terms.All %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupM.Predator.98 - GroupM.Control.98"))$term_id,
                                                 "Female: Predator vs Control" = (DGE.GO.Terms.All %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupF.Predator.98 - GroupF.Control.98"))$term_id,
                                                 "Predator: Male vs Female" = (DGE.GO.Terms.All %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupM.Predator.98 - GroupF.Predator.98"))$term_id,
                                                 "Control: Male vs Female" = (DGE.GO.Terms.All %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupM.Control.98 - GroupF.Control.98"))$term_id)) + 
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Paired") + 
  labs(title = "Timepoint 98")+ 
  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = .2))
```

```{r, Venn Diagram for 144}

VD.DGE.GO.144 <-ggVennDiagram::ggVennDiagram(x = list("Male: Predator vs Control" = (DGE.GO.Terms.All %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupM.Predator.144 - GroupM.Control.144"))$term_id,
                                                 "Female: Predator vs Control" = (DGE.GO.Terms.All %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupF.Predator.144 - GroupF.Control.144"))$term_id,
                                                 "Predator: Male vs Female" = (DGE.GO.Terms.All %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupM.Predator.144 - GroupF.Predator.144"))$term_id,
                                                 "Control: Male vs Female" = (DGE.GO.Terms.All %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupM.Control.144 - GroupF.Control.144"))$term_id)) + 
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Paired") + 
  labs(title = "Timepoint 144")+ 
  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = .2))
```

```{r, Venn Diagram for 240}

VD.DGE.GO.240 <-ggVennDiagram::ggVennDiagram(x = list("Male: Predator vs Control" = (DGE.GO.Terms.All %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupM.Predator.240 - GroupM.Control.240"))$term_id,
                                                 "Female: Predator vs Control" = (DGE.GO.Terms.All %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupF.Predator.240 - GroupF.Control.240"))$term_id,
                                                 "Predator: Male vs Female" = (DGE.GO.Terms.All %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupM.Predator.240 - GroupF.Predator.240"))$term_id,
                                                 "Control: Male vs Female" = (DGE.GO.Terms.All %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupM.Control.240 - GroupF.Control.240"))$term_id)) + 
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Paired") + 
  labs(title = "Timepoint 240")+ 
  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = .2))
```

##### Sex Differences Overall

```{r, Venn Diagram for 48}

VD.DGE.GO.Sex <-ggVennDiagram::ggVennDiagram(x = list("Timepoint 48" = (DGE.GO.Terms.All %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "(GroupM.Predator.48 + GroupM.Control.48 - GroupF.Predator.48 - GroupF.Control.48)/4"))$term_id,
                                                 "Timepoint 98" = (DGE.GO.Terms.All %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "(GroupM.Predator.98 + GroupM.Control.98 - GroupF.Predator.98 - GroupF.Control.88)/4"))$term_id,
                                                 "Timepoint 144" = (DGE.GO.Terms.All %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "(GroupM.Predator.144 + GroupM.Control.144 - GroupF.Predator.144 - GroupF.Control.144)/4"))$term_id,
                                                 "Timepoint 240" = (DGE.GO.Terms.All %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "(GroupM.Predator.240 + GroupM.Control.240 - GroupF.Predator.240 - GroupF.Control.240)/4"))$term_id)) + 
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Paired") + 
  labs(title = "Male vs Female")+ 
  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = .2))
```

### DME

#### Global
```{r, Venn Diagram for 98 vs 48}

VD.DME.98.48 <-ggVennDiagram::ggVennDiagram(x = list("Control Male" = (WGCNA.DEM.Results %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupM.Control.98 - GroupM.Control.48"))$Module,
                                                 "Control Female" = (WGCNA.DEM.Results %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupF.Control.98 - GroupF.Control.48"))$Module,
                                                 "Predator Male" = (WGCNA.DEM.Results %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupM.Predator.98 - GroupM.Predator.48"))$Module,
                                                 "Predator Female" = (WGCNA.DEM.Results %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupF.Predator.98 - GroupF.Predator.48"))$Module)) + 
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Paired") + 
  labs(title = "Timepoint 98 vs 48") + 
  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = .2))
```

```{r, Venn Diagram for 144 vs 98}

VD.DME.144.98 <-ggVennDiagram::ggVennDiagram(x = list("Control Male" = (WGCNA.DEM.Results %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupM.Control.144 - GroupM.Control.98"))$Module,
                                                 "Control Female" = (WGCNA.DEM.Results %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupF.Control.144 - GroupF.Control.98"))$Module,
                                                 "Predator Male" = (WGCNA.DEM.Results %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupM.Predator.144 - GroupM.Predator.98"))$Module,
                                                 "Predator Female" = (WGCNA.DEM.Results %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupF.Predator.144 - GroupF.Predator.98"))$Module)) + 
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Paired") + 
  labs(title = "Timepoint 144 vs 98") + 
  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = .2))
```

```{r, Venn Diagram for 240 vs 144}

VD.DME.240.144 <-ggVennDiagram::ggVennDiagram(x = list("Control Male" = (WGCNA.DEM.Results %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupM.Control.240 - GroupM.Control.144"))$Module,
                                                 "Control Female" = (WGCNA.DEM.Results %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupF.Control.240 - GroupF.Control.144"))$Module,
                                                 "Predator Male" = (WGCNA.DEM.Results %>%
                                                                     dplyr::filter(Contrast == "GroupM.Predator.240 - GroupM.Predator.144"))$Module,
                                                 "Predator Female" = (WGCNA.DEM.Results %>%
